programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Aled Jones is back on home turf in north Wales as he takes a journey exploring how his faith has shaped his life and his singing, catching up with composer Howard Goodall and the Rev Canon Mark Oakley along the way. Aled sings a couple of songs that are special to him and picks his favourite hymns for the programme, including Guide Me, O Thou Great Jehovah and How Great Thou Art

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Sarah Moore enlists the talents of master carpenter Norman Wilkinson, designer Daniel Heath and lighting guru Guy Trench to transform four items she has salvaged from the nation's tips into top-end treasured pieces

programme.title: Escape to the Country

programme.title: Children in Need

programme.title: Life Is Magic
programme.desc: Highlights from the programme in which illusionist Joel M took his conjuring skills to parties and events around the country, helping to create life-changing celebrations

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Footage of marine life in different environments around the north, beginning with a tropical coral reef which has medicinal properties for dolphins, and is used as a tool by tusk fish. In Japan, a shipwreck is home to the Asian sheepshead wrasse, which can change gender, while in the polar north, walruses struggle to find ice floes for their pups to rest on as climate change takes its toll on the environment

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Ellie Harrison explores the powers of the great outdoors to provide a tonic in troubled times as she immerses herself in nature, from forest bathing to wild swimming. There are also films from the Countryfile archives about the health-giving prowess of the UK's green havens, including John Craven finding out how nature helped heal wartime wounds, and Anita Rani visiting a special farm giving respite to refugees

programme.title: Strictly Come Dancing
programme.desc: Tess Daly and Claudia Winkleman announce the results of the judges' scores and viewers' votes from Saturday's performances. The two couples with the lowest combined scores will take part in a dance-off before Shirley Ballas, Craig Revel Horwood and guest judge Anton Du Beke decide who will be the third pair to leave the contest. With music by the Vamps

programme.title: His Dark Materials
programme.desc: Lyra crosses into Will's world and finds it to be very different to her own, and after encountering the enigmatic Charles Latrom, the pair head to find a scholar to help get answers about Dust. Will is shocked to discover he has grandparents, but quickly realises he can't trust them, while a calculating Mrs Coulter pushes MacPhail to act after Graves' strong performance during the interrogation of a witch consul

programme.title: Small Axe
programme.desc: The first episode of Steve McQueen's drama anthology based on the real-life experiences of London's West Indian community from the late-1960s to the mid-1980s. The film tells the story of the Old Bailey trial of Frank Crichlow, the owner of West Indian restaurant Mangrove in London's Notting Hill, who in 1970 was one of nine men and women wrongly arrested and charged with incitement to riot and affray after a protest about racial discrimination by the police. Starring Shaun Parkes, Letitia Wright and Malachi Kirby

programme.title: Our World
programme.desc: Five years ago, an electrician called Ali Motamed was shot and killed in Almere, just outside Amsterdam. It looked like a professional hit job - but why would anyone want to assassinate a seemingly innocent electrician? In the hours which followed, his wife told police he wasn't really Ali Motamed at all - his real name was Mohammad Reza Kolahi Samadi, and he was a wanted man in Tehran. So could the Iranian regime have ordered his killing? And could it also be behind the strikingly similar murder of another Iranian in The Hague in 2017? Jiyar Gol follows a trail of destruction across Europe: from the killings in the Netherlands, to a bomb plot in Paris in 2018 to an attempted assassination in Denmark. It's a story of spies, lies and geopolitics, with a string of extraordinary twists. Could Iran have orchestrated assassinations and an attempted bombing on European soil?

programme.desc: The lovable halfwit unknowingly takes a monkey home in his car after visiting a safari park. After hearing on the news that the monkey has been 'stolen', Bean realises he must return him without getting into trouble

programme.title: Scrambled!
programme.desc: Two hours of children's fun and entertainment

programme.desc: Spike leaves Tom in charge of his boy Tyke only to discover upon his return that Tyke now behaves more like a cat than a dog

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Pedro told his mum he was running the hotel, but now she's coming to visit

programme.title: DC Superhero Girls
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by the amount of Superman coverage in Metropolis, Supergirl decides to show people what she's made of.

programme.title: How
programme.desc: Vick Hope, Sam Homewood, and Frankie Vu ask questions beginning with the word How. Vick explains how to look like a jet-setter with the help of a loo seat, while Frankie has a disaster when he proves to Sam how water can bend metal, and Fred Dinenage wraps things up when he challenges the team to the ultimate Dinenage dance-off

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The teenage superheroes fight to save the world while getting up to mischievous antics

programme.title: Best Walks with a View with Julia Bradbury
programme.desc: The expert walker's favourite river walk finds her in Devon, following the green tree canopy of water rapids along the East Lyn and Hoar Oak rivers, where they merge at Watersmeet. While in the county, Julia makes sure she finds time to enjoy a hard-earned cream tea

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh welcomes Nigel Havers and Bonnie Langford to the farm in Hampshire, and David Domoney has winter colour ideas for the garden

programme.title: All Around Britain
programme.desc: Alex Beresford and Ria Hebden discover what it takes to prepare Blenheim Palace for the festive season. Plus, a visit to Chester Zoo and a look at the recently restored Monsoon Rainforest

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: The team comes to the aid of ex-soldier Luke Simpson, who lost his leg in an explosion while deployed in Afghanistan. Rebuilding his life and health with the support of his wife Jackie, the war hero has struggled to make progress on the garden of his dreams. As Alan and the crew work their magic, Frances Tophill reveals the key design elements for a cottage-style plot, Katie Rushworth demonstrates how to make the most out of cut flowers and David Domoney provides hints and tips on maintaining the perfect lawn

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents coverage of day three of the November Meeting, featuring the 3.00 Greatwood Hurdle and support races at 1.50, 2.25 and 3.35. Plus, races at 2.10 from Punchestown and 3.15 from Fontwell. With analysis from AP McCoy and Mick Fitzgerald, reports by Oli Bell, Matt Chapman, Alice Plunkett and Mick Fitzgerald, and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four more contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. Emily, Katie, Lisa and Sam must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Rock On, Tommy: The Bobby Ball Story
programme.desc: In a tribute to one of the UK's most popular entertainers, friends, family and co-stars celebrate the life and work of comedian and actor Bobby Ball. It reveals how a factory welder from Oldham went on to become one of the best loved stars on British television. It's narrated by Bobby's colleague of 57 years, Tommy Cannon

programme.title: 5 Gold Rings
programme.desc: Married Portuguese couple Jo and Eliana take on father and daughter Simon and Laura to try and win more than £50,000 in the game show hosted by Phillip Schofield

programme.title: Tipping Point: Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Catastrophe star Rob Delaney, cricket veteran Graeme Swann and comedian Holly Walsh take on each other as well as the arcade-style machine in the hope of winning £20,000 for charity. Ben Shephard hosts

programme.title: Family Fortunes
programme.desc: The family of TV presenter Rachel Riley and her husband and former Strictly star Pasha Kovalev take on the family of footballing veteran Chris Kamara for a chance to win a £30,000 jackpot prize for their chosen charities. Gino D'Acampo hosts

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!
programme.desc: For the first time in its history, Ant and Dec host the show in the UK. Mo Farah, Shane Richie, Victoria Derbyshire, Beverley Callard, Vernon Kay and AJ Pritchard hope they have what it takes to win 2020's long awaited series. Also taking part are actress Jessica Plummer, DJ Jordan North, Paralympic champion Hollie Arnold, and author Giovanna Fletcher. But what will they make of their new home, Gwrych Castle in Abergele on the north Wales coast?

programme.title: UEFA Nations League Highlights
programme.desc: Mark Pougatch presents action from the latest fixtures, including Belgium v England at King Baudouin Stadium, Slovakia v Scotland at Anton Malatinsky Stadium, Wales v Republic of Ireland at Cardiff City Stadium, and Austria v Northern Ireland at Ernst Happel Stadion. With analysis from Roy Keane and Ian Wright

programme.title: The Diana Interview: Revenge of a Princess
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary examining the impact of the Princess of Wales' Panorama interview with Martin Bashir in 1995, when she revealed a royal marriage in crisis with infidelities on both sides. Friends of the princess describe how the public image of the couple's marital happiness was a mirage from the start and how a decade of betrayal was to inspire in her an anger and desire for public recognition of her private pain

programme.title: Motorsport UK
programme.desc: Richard John Neil presents action from Knockhill, featuring the British F4 Championship and the Ginetta GT5 Challenge

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Judge Rinder
programme.desc: Cameras follow criminal barrister Robert Rinder as he takes on real-life cases in a studio courtroom

programme.desc: Morning magazine featuring a lively mix of news and current affairs, plus health, entertainment and lifestyle features

programme.title: Lorraine

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: A mix of celebrity chat, lifestyle features, advice and competitions

programme.title: Loose Women
programme.desc: Celebrity interviews and studio discussion from a female perspective

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson and the team visit Wolverhampton, where Henry Nicholls picks up a couple of paintings with very different price tags, while Tony Geering takes on a troublesome twosome. Simon Schneider turns horse dealer and Karen Dalmeny ends up with a very fancy clock

programme.title: Winning Combination
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Omid Djalili in which nine contestants are assigned a number between one and nine. They are then whittled down to a final four, and the combination of numbers they are assigned represents the size of the jackpot they will play for in a final round

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants including Stuart, Sian and Rich pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Dawn makes Jamie an offer, Vinny tells Mandy he is moving out, and Belle's mental health continues to spiral

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Peter tries to reassure Simon over the Oliver situation, but when Carla has a conflicting view, they become embroiled in a nasty argument, and Carla is left stung. Meanwhile, Leanne tries to persuade Steve to change his mind, and Craig gains an insight into Ray's grand plan

programme.title: Ainsley's Food We Love
programme.desc: Ainsley Harriott prepares a selection of retro dishes inspired by classics of the past, including minced beef, potato and onion pie, served with buttery greens, and finishes off with a queen of puddings. Plus, chef Brian Turner reveals why faggots deserve a comeback

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: After having his taxi stolen, a shaken Peter gives in to his demons. Meanwhile, Ray attempts to buy Craig's silence over the development, and Todd takes a cynical view of Sean's new venture

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!
programme.desc: The famous faces get used to life in their new surroundings at Gwrych Castle in Abergele on the north Wales coast as they take part in the trials to try to win food for everyone. Ant and Dec oversee proceedings

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: The Millennium Dome Heist with Ross Kemp
programme.desc: The actor reveals the story of the nine-month game of cat-and-mouse between police and a criminal gang intent on stealing diamonds worth £350 million from the Millennium Dome in London in November 2000

programme.title: The Diana Interview: Revenge of a Princess
programme.desc: The conclusion of the two-part documentary examines how the Princess of Wales' 1995 Panorama interview created scandal and division within the BBC itself, leading to a serious rift in the higher echelons of the corporation. The programme examines suggestions that Diana's involvement was gained through the use of fake documents, and features contributions from a graphic designer at the centre of the allegations

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley.

programme.title: Back to Mine
programme.desc: Dating show in which singletons hunt for a potential partner by rifling through three different homes. Yorkshire lass Cheryl takes along her best friend Danielle as she checks out a trio of homes. She has a habit of dating bad boys and is keen to break this trend. Will she find her perfect match in the lads' pad, the swish flat or the rustic farm retreat? Narrated by Rochelle Humes

programme.title: Mr Magoo

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Chaotic cartoon capers following the further adventures of the popular halfwit immortalised in the live-action TV series and Hollywood film. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: The lovable halfwit unknowingly takes a monkey home in his car after visiting a safari park. After hearing on the news that the monkey has been 'stolen', Bean realises he must return him without getting into trouble

programme.title: Scrambled!
programme.desc: Two hours of children's fun and entertainment

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: Spike leaves Tom in charge of his boy Tyke only to discover upon his return that Tyke now behaves more like a cat than a dog

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Pedro told his mum he was running the hotel, but now she's coming to visit

programme.title: DC Superhero Girls
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by the amount of Superman coverage in Metropolis, Supergirl decides to show people what she's made of.

programme.title: How
programme.desc: Vick Hope, Sam Homewood, and Frankie Vu ask questions beginning with the word How. Vick explains how to look like a jet-setter with the help of a loo seat, while Frankie has a disaster when he proves to Sam how water can bend metal, and Fred Dinenage wraps things up when he challenges the team to the ultimate Dinenage dance-off

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The teenage superheroes fight to save the world while getting up to mischievous antics

programme.title: Best Walks with a View with Julia Bradbury
programme.desc: The expert walker's favourite river walk finds her in Devon, following the green tree canopy of water rapids along the East Lyn and Hoar Oak rivers, where they merge at Watersmeet. While in the county, Julia makes sure she finds time to enjoy a hard-earned cream tea

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh welcomes Nigel Havers and Bonnie Langford to the farm in Hampshire, and David Domoney has winter colour ideas for the garden

programme.title: All Around Britain
programme.desc: Alex Beresford and Ria Hebden discover what it takes to prepare Blenheim Palace for the festive season. Plus, a visit to Chester Zoo and a look at the recently restored Monsoon Rainforest

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: The team comes to the aid of ex-soldier Luke Simpson, who lost his leg in an explosion while deployed in Afghanistan. Rebuilding his life and health with the support of his wife Jackie, the war hero has struggled to make progress on the garden of his dreams. As Alan and the crew work their magic, Frances Tophill reveals the key design elements for a cottage-style plot, Katie Rushworth demonstrates how to make the most out of cut flowers and David Domoney provides hints and tips on maintaining the perfect lawn

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents coverage of day three of the November Meeting, featuring the 3.00 Greatwood Hurdle and support races at 1.50, 2.25 and 3.35. Plus, races at 2.10 from Punchestown and 3.15 from Fontwell. With analysis from AP McCoy and Mick Fitzgerald, reports by Oli Bell, Matt Chapman, Alice Plunkett and Mick Fitzgerald, and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four more contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. Emily, Katie, Lisa and Sam must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Rock On, Tommy: The Bobby Ball Story
programme.desc: In a tribute to one of the UK's most popular entertainers, friends, family and co-stars celebrate the life and work of comedian and actor Bobby Ball. It reveals how a factory welder from Oldham went on to become one of the best loved stars on British television. It's narrated by Bobby's colleague of 57 years, Tommy Cannon

programme.title: 5 Gold Rings
programme.desc: Married Portuguese couple Jo and Eliana take on father and daughter Simon and Laura to try and win more than £50,000 in the game show hosted by Phillip Schofield

programme.title: Tipping Point: Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Catastrophe star Rob Delaney, cricket veteran Graeme Swann and comedian Holly Walsh take on each other as well as the arcade-style machine in the hope of winning £20,000 for charity. Ben Shephard hosts

programme.title: Family Fortunes
programme.desc: The family of TV presenter Rachel Riley and her husband and former Strictly star Pasha Kovalev take on the family of footballing veteran Chris Kamara for a chance to win a £30,000 jackpot prize for their chosen charities. Gino D'Acampo hosts

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!
programme.desc: For the first time in its history, Ant and Dec host the show in the UK. Mo Farah, Shane Richie, Victoria Derbyshire, Beverley Callard, Vernon Kay and AJ Pritchard hope they have what it takes to win 2020's long awaited series. Also taking part are actress Jessica Plummer, DJ Jordan North, Paralympic champion Hollie Arnold, and author Giovanna Fletcher. But what will they make of their new home, Gwrych Castle in Abergele on the north Wales coast?

programme.title: UEFA Nations League Highlights
programme.desc: Mark Pougatch presents action from the latest fixtures, including Belgium v England at King Baudouin Stadium, Slovakia v Scotland at Anton Malatinsky Stadium, Wales v Republic of Ireland at Cardiff City Stadium, and Austria v Northern Ireland at Ernst Happel Stadion. With analysis from Roy Keane and Ian Wright

programme.title: The Diana Interview: Revenge of a Princess
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary examining the impact of the Princess of Wales' Panorama interview with Martin Bashir in 1995, when she revealed a royal marriage in crisis with infidelities on both sides. Friends of the princess describe how the public image of the couple's marital happiness was a mirage from the start and how a decade of betrayal was to inspire in her an anger and desire for public recognition of her private pain

programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness presents a new series of the dating game show. A model, a circus performer, a football coach and a salesman enter the 'love lift' in the hope of impressing 30 single women and winning a date - but must first get the female participants to keep their lights on as a sign of approval

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring a party trick gone wrong, a rogue wave interrupting a photo opportunity and a lesson in why balloons should not be used near work tools

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill unveils more digital disasters. Featuring a wallet and key stealing monkey and a semi-skilled scientist, while helmets are definitely required for a collection of bicycle accidents

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden worries that his new girlfriend is cheating on him. Meanwhile, Alan gets even more intertwined in Lyndsey and Larry's relationship when he starts dating Larry's sister Gretchen. Sitcom, starring Ashton Kutcher and Jon Cryer

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Lyndsey finds out about Alan's relationship with Larry's sister, Gretchen, and Walden has a difficult time telling Barry to find his own place. Comedy, starring Jon Cryer and Ashton Kutcher

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Brian posts an offensive tweet that goes viral and the Griffins tell him he has to move out after the residents of Quahog begin to shun them

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter discovers an alternative ending in the Russian version of one of his favourite films and writes to Vladimir Putin, who comes to Quahog. Meanwhile, a strapped-for-cash Brian gets a job at a suicide hotline centre and attempts to strike up a romance with a co-worker

programme.title: Don't Hate the Playaz
programme.desc: Maya Jama, Big Narstie and Babatunde Aleshe go up against Lady Leshurr, Fern Brady, M Huncho and Nafe Smallz. They go head to head in rap battles, dance-offs and freestyling challenges. Jordan Stephens hosts, with help from DJ Shortee Blitz on the decks

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Chris volunteers to take care of his Mexican girlfriend's twin babies, but after learning that she cannot come back to the US, the Griffins go to Mexico to reunite her with her children

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter's new friendship with a paramedic boosts his self-esteem, prompting him to dump his old pals, but he soon realises he cannot keep up with the man's active lifestyle

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan is crushed when he realises his loved ones have forgotten about Father's Day, so he gives them a chance to make it up to him by celebrating belatedly. When he is less than thrilled with the results, he uses the CIA's Memory-Neutraliser to Groundhog Day the family, erasing their memories of the last 24 hours and forcing them to relive the holiday until it is perfect

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan discovers a valuable salt deposit beneath the Smiths' back garden, but when he tries to sell the mining rights, he discovers he signed them over to Steve years ago

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: While looking for a college for Roberta, Cleveland returns to his alma mater during homecoming in a bid to relive the old days. However, he is disappointed when his former fraternity gives him the cold shoulder. Meanwhile, Rallo tries to help Cleveland Jr sleep without his stuffed tiger, Larry

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Cleveland Jr volunteers for a church trip after falling for a girl in the choir, but his friend Hunter criticises him for only attending to spend time with her. Meanwhile, Donna's ex-boyfriend returns from Iraq to discover she is now married. Animated comedy, featuring the voices of guest stars Darren Criss (Glee) and Fergie (Black Eyed Peas)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden worries that his new girlfriend is cheating on him. Meanwhile, Alan gets even more intertwined in Lyndsey and Larry's relationship when he starts dating Larry's sister Gretchen. Sitcom, starring Ashton Kutcher and Jon Cryer

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Lyndsey finds out about Alan's relationship with Larry's sister, Gretchen, and Walden has a difficult time telling Barry to find his own place. Comedy, starring Jon Cryer and Ashton Kutcher

programme.title: Iain Stirling's CelebAbility
programme.desc: Iain Stirling hosts as five friends take on Scarlett Moffatt, Samira Mighty, Tom Parker, London Hughes and Brennan Reece in challenges based on unusual abilities

programme.title: Totally Bonkers Guinness World Records
programme.desc: Matt Edmondson narrates a selection of some of the most incredible and peculiar record-breaking attempts

programme.title: ITV2 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Omnibus.Leanne leans on Steve during their first day in court, Paul is furious that Todd is working at Underworld, and Sean and Michael embark on a new adventure

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Omnibus. Bear is exasperated with Paddy, Lydia is shocked at Nate's admission, and Vinny is uneasy with Mandy's idea

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate the deaths of a female pensioner and a vicar who were both killed during Broughton village's annual contest between men and women. The pair soon discover the preacher had a secret that could provide a motive - but when another body is found, they realise the answer to all the deaths lies in the history books. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The owner of local country magazine Midsomer Life becomes a suspect when a man's body is discovered in woodland, and it is established the victim had been having an affair with his wife. As Barnaby and Jones delve into the case, another murder forces them to reassess their inquiries. Detective drama, starring John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Simon Williams

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Two couples disappear in the tiny village of Monks Barton amid rumours of witchcraft and haunted woods. As Barnaby and Jones investigate, psychic Cyrus LeVanu clashes with cleric Wallace Stone over their different methods of 'healing' the woods, while other locals seem to be caught up in a stolen antiques racket. When a body is unearthed and the death toll rises, the detectives race to catch the killer by finding a connection between the missing couples and the thefts. Anton Lesser guest stars, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: The Best of Cannon and Ball
programme.desc: Double act Tommy Cannon and Bobby Ball entertain us with their own unique brand of humour. Featuring guest stars Status Quo and Rik Mayall.

programme.title: Carry On Camping (1969)
programme.desc: Two men lure their unsuspecting girlfriends to a nudist camp, with hopes of having a wild old time - but the joke is on the men when it turns out they have ended up at a traditional family campsite. Bawdy comedy, starring Sid James, Bernard Bresslaw, Kenneth Williams, Joan Sims and Barbara Windsor

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Young physiotherapist Lizzie Faulkner is shot dead while enjoying a holiday at a luxury country retreat. The resulting murder investigation unearths betrayal, guilt and the desire for atonement - as Vera moves quickly to avoid another tragedy, and Joe tries to make amends with the demons of his past. Crime drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, David Leon, Paul Ritter and Eva Quinn

programme.title: The Loch
programme.desc: The police hold a press conference to appeal for information about Jonjo, and Smilie hopes to take the opportunity to reassure the public that they have nothing to fear and prevent news of the human heart found by the lake from spreading further. However, his plans are disrupted by Blake, who reveals everything and shares his theory that the community is being terrorised by a serial killer. An unexpected discovery is made outside the village hall during a town meeting set up to try and identify the killer

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: David Suchet takes on his final case as the Belgian sleuth in the last-ever episode of the long-running drama. Crippled with arthritis, Poirot is now using a wheelchair and has a life-threatening heart condition, but remains as sharp as ever. Calling on old friend Captain Hastings for assistance, he returns to Styles, where the pair first met 30 years earlier on a murder investigation. The detective is convinced the country house is once again harbouring a killer, and as guests fall victim to a mysterious attacker, he must summon the last of his strength to battle his ultimate nemesis. With Hugh Fraser, Anne Reid, Philip Glenister, Helen Baxendale, Matthew McNulty, Anna Madeley and Shaun Dingwall

programme.title: Griff's Great Britain
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones explores the Shropshire countryside along the border between England and Wales, taking to the air to survey the landscape in all its glory. He then embarks on his final challenge, which takes him from Ludlow to the engineering marvel that is Chirk Aqueduct and on to Church Stretton and the Llangollen Canal

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sally and Mike enter the junk market and use the garden to store their wares - until Sid puts his foot down. Comedy, starring Sally Geeson and Robin Stewart

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Betty asks her neighbours to babysit, but Sid is less than keen to help. Comedy, starring Sid James and Patsy Rowlands

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Omnibus. Bear is exasperated with Paddy, Lydia is shocked at Nate's admission, and Vinny is uneasy with Mandy's idea

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Audrey tells Gail that Roy will ruin the cafe. Alf warns Ken that he has had a complaint over his affair with Sue. Chris Collins asks Kevin for work at the garage

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fraser demands to know who told the police about the job, and Liz is terrified when he lays into her. Ken warns Sue that people are gossiping about them

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Ned and Roy wait to see Jan at the police station. Jack and Sarah keep up the pretence that they are still together in front of the social worker

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack uses the situation with an Andy as an excuse to move back home. Ned speaks to a psychiatrist about Jan. Steve catches Kim on the phone arranging to meet the blackmailer

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A prisoner is broken out of Ashfordly prison to pilot a helicopter on a secret mission, and Debbie begins acting strangely when a familiar face returns to the village. Meanwhile, Rob is left distraught when a boy takes revenge for the death of his dog

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid believes he is in for a fortune when a friend mentions him in his will. Comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sally and Mike enter the junk market and use the garden to store their wares - until Sid puts his foot down. Comedy, starring Sally Geeson and Robin Stewart

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Tongues are set wagging when the house on the hill changes hands

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: The first episode of the whimsical rural drama based on HE Bates' novels. Tax collector Cedric Charlton visits the Larkin household intent on getting the head of the family - Pop - to correctly fill out his tax forms. In so doing he falls for attractive daughter Mariette. Starring David Jason, Pam Ferris and Catherine Zeta-Jones

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: The family prepares for a celebration, and Margo is determined to persuade the reclusive Countess Mavrodaki to attend. Sven is put to the test by his potential family, but seems to make a good impression. Gerry begins to question whether keeping animals in his personal zoo is fair, and considers releasing them into the wild

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A Frenchwoman arrives to help with preparations for Aidensfield's twinning with her home town, but things go wrong when she is left to the tender mercies of Peggy. Rob marks his return to the village by saving a con-man after his car crashes into the river, while district nurse Carol Cassidy struggles to treat a woman with an over-protective husband. Jonathan Kerrigan and Lisa Kay star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve wants Kim to let him deal with the blackmailer. The Dingles make plans for Zak's birthday. Kathy takes pity on Marlon and lets him stay with her for a few days

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack is angry when he finds out Billy has been writing to Andy. Daniels tells Steve that he has video evidence of Kim setting up the murder of the lady in the lake

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gary does not know how to cope with grieving Judy. Liz is shocked when Jacqui turns up at Fraser's flat. Deirdre tells Liz she is a fool for still wanting to be with Fraser

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz gives Gerry the slip and runs out of The Hourglass before turning to Jim for help. Ken tells Sue he needs his teaching salary to keep seeing Daniel in Scotland

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A man's apparent suicide in an armoured car shocks the village of Morton Fendle, but things take a more sinister turn upon the discovery he was not alone when he died. Top of Barnaby and Jones's list of suspects is the victim's missing girlfriend - whose mysterious hold over the war-blighted residents could provide the key to the mystery. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The fatal poisoning of a deaconess who was about to become Oxford's first female chaplain makes Morse wonder whether the city's conservative clerics could be hiding a deadly secret. Further investigation uncovers a connection between the murder and a weight loss clinic. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately and Zoe Wanamaker (My Family)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin's medical career remains under scrutiny, as a GMC representative arrives to assess him and his surgery, while having resigned from her job as headmistress at the local school, Louisa pursues a new career in child counselling. Elsewhere, Al accidentally proposes to Morwenna, and Mrs Tishell has a new lease on life

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The detective has been assigned to a quiet rural area in 1969, and finds himself back in uniform. However, he is reunited with his former CID colleagues when he discovers the body of a missing schoolgirl. Endeavour quickly finds a likely suspect, and is offered the chance to regain his lost status by making an arrest - but Thursday convinces him the man is innocent

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: The year 1956 finds jazz-loving clergyman Sidney Chambers attending a talk by Reverend Nathaniel Todd, a member of the formative US civil rights movement. During the event, protestors disrupt the speech and release fireworks, causing the audience to panic. In the chaos, Todd's son Charles is stabbed and killed by an unseen assailant. The murder sees racial tensions spike and Geordie Keating is called in to investigate. Things are further complicated when Sidney finds himself drawn to passionate young activist, and their tentative romance faces pressure from all sides. Robson Green stars, with James Norton, Tessa Peake-Jones, Samuel West and Paterson Joseph

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Mischievous artist Harry Field, who specialises in preparing bogus coats of arms for gullible American tourists, is murdered - and Morse takes a personal interest in finding the culprit. But as investigations progress, he discovers the victim was not quite the lovable rogue he initially appeared. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately, Geraldine James and Freddie Jones

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Betty asks her neighbours to babysit, but Sid is less than keen to help. Comedy, starring Sid James and Patsy Rowlands

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is delighted when Mike announces his intention to marry into wealth - until a close link between the two families is uncovered

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Attempts to scare off Robert's other mother leave him little to crow about

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Pop busies himself organising a christening while awaiting the birth of his first grandchild - and still finds time to cast a beady eye over the contents of an elderly widow's home. Whimsical rural drama, starring David Jason, Pam Ferris, Philip Franks and Catherine Zeta-Jones

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Louisa tries to raise some money by selling homemade food, which attracts the attention of another Englishman. However, a former lover threatens the family's idyllic existence. Gerry comes up with a plan to breed otters, Leslie accidentally shoots Roger, and Margo considers becoming a nun. Return of the drama series based on Gerald Durrell's books, starring Keeley Hawes

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A recently released ex-convict who served time for the rape of a local girl becomes the target of a hate campaign - prompting Rob to point the finger of suspicion at the victim's family. The bobby is shocked when old acquaintance DS Rachel Dawson arrives in Aidensfield on the trail of an escaped prisoner, while Peggy accidentally knocks down an old friend with her car. Jonathan Kerrigan stars

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Dingles take Zak to meet his birthday present. Marlon hears Nigel Hibbert is coming to the tearooms. Kim is disappointed when Steve does not give her the video

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon confronts Butch about the rock that was thrown through the caravan window. Steve puts the video in a safety deposit box, and Kim asks him to move in with her

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gerry keeps Liz, Jim and Andy at gunpoint, and the neighbours are stunned when a gunshot comes from number 11. Des and Samantha go to the airfield to do their parachute jump

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jack enjoys looking after Brad but Vera feels Tricia takes advantage of him too much. Alf takes his driving test, and Fiona rows with Alan for putting Liz in danger

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A mischievous trickster finally gets his comeuppance when his body is found floating below the weir in Midsomer Deverell. The extent of his double life starts to emerge when three family friends and a long-lost niece produce wills claiming his fortune, and his collection of erotic photographs from the 1960s gives Barnaby and Jones the key to the tangled relationships and feuds blighting the family

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Mischievous artist Harry Field, who specialises in preparing bogus coats of arms for gullible American tourists, is murdered - and Morse takes a personal interest in finding the culprit. But as investigations progress, he discovers the victim was not quite the lovable rogue he initially appeared. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately, Geraldine James and Freddie Jones

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin's GMC report requires he passes three refresher courses which will then decide whether he is deemed fit to practice, starting with phlebotomy. Meanwhile, Louisa focuses on her new career as a child and adolescent counsellor. Much to Bert's dismay, Al hires Caitlin, and confesses to his accidental proposal

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Shaun Evans directs this episode, set against the backdrop of the first moon landings in 1969. The detective investigates the deaths of an astrophysicist and his girlfriend in a tragic car accident as the rest of the world eagerly awaits news from Apollo 11. When he begins to suspect foul play, Endeavour enlists Thursday's help in getting to the truth, visiting the observatory where the dead man worked and discovering the possibility that he was not the intended victim. The case is complicated further when the dead scientist is revealed to have been part of a mysterious cult-like group

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: With Violet gone, Sidney loses himself in drink. After a heavy whiskey session leaves him without his jacket - and little memory of the night before - he discovers to his horror that he was the last person to see a young woman alive. As he struggles to remember her final words, Geordie grows concerned - both for the murdered girl, so callously abandoned outside a local slum, and for his friend's troubled state of mind. James Norton stars, with Robson Green, Tessa Peake-Jones, Al Weaver and Kacey Ainsworth

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford sleuth investigates a double mystery connected to the local Greek community - the death of a restaurant chef and the disappearance of a baby - and wonders whether an academic event attended by some of the university's leading classical scholars could shed light on the case. Mystery, starring John Thaw and Kevin Whately, with Jan Harvey, Martin Jarvis and James Hazeldine

programme.desc: The fatal poisoning of a deaconess who was about to become Oxford's first female chaplain makes Morse wonder whether the city's conservative clerics could be hiding a deadly secret. Further investigation uncovers a connection between the murder and a weight loss clinic. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately and Zoe Wanamaker (My Family)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin's medical career remains under scrutiny, as a GMC representative arrives to assess him and his surgery, while having resigned from her job as headmistress at the local school, Louisa pursues a new career in child counselling. Elsewhere, Al accidentally proposes to Morwenna, and Mrs Tishell has a new lease on life

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The detective has been assigned to a quiet rural area in 1969, and finds himself back in uniform. However, he is reunited with his former CID colleagues when he discovers the body of a missing schoolgirl. Endeavour quickly finds a likely suspect, and is offered the chance to regain his lost status by making an arrest - but Thursday convinces him the man is innocent

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: The year 1956 finds jazz-loving clergyman Sidney Chambers attending a talk by Reverend Nathaniel Todd, a member of the formative US civil rights movement. During the event, protestors disrupt the speech and release fireworks, causing the audience to panic. In the chaos, Todd's son Charles is stabbed and killed by an unseen assailant. The murder sees racial tensions spike and Geordie Keating is called in to investigate. Things are further complicated when Sidney finds himself drawn to passionate young activist, and their tentative romance faces pressure from all sides. Robson Green stars, with James Norton, Tessa Peake-Jones, Samuel West and Paterson Joseph

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Mischievous artist Harry Field, who specialises in preparing bogus coats of arms for gullible American tourists, is murdered - and Morse takes a personal interest in finding the culprit. But as investigations progress, he discovers the victim was not quite the lovable rogue he initially appeared. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately, Geraldine James and Freddie Jones

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gary does not know how to cope with grieving Judy. Liz is shocked when Jacqui turns up at Fraser's flat. Deirdre tells Liz she is a fool for still wanting to be with Fraser

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz gives Gerry the slip and runs out of The Hourglass before turning to Jim for help. Ken tells Sue he needs his teaching salary to keep seeing Daniel in Scotland

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve wants Kim to let him deal with the blackmailer. The Dingles make plans for Zak's birthday. Kathy takes pity on Marlon and lets him stay with her for a few days

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack is angry when he finds out Billy has been writing to Andy. Daniels tells Steve that he has video evidence of Kim setting up the murder of the lady in the lake

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A Frenchwoman arrives to help with preparations for Aidensfield's twinning with her home town, but things go wrong when she is left to the tender mercies of Peggy. Rob marks his return to the village by saving a con-man after his car crashes into the river, while district nurse Carol Cassidy struggles to treat a woman with an over-protective husband. Jonathan Kerrigan and Lisa Kay star

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Betty asks her neighbours to babysit, but Sid is less than keen to help. Comedy, starring Sid James and Patsy Rowlands

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is delighted when Mike announces his intention to marry into wealth - until a close link between the two families is uncovered

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Attempts to scare off Robert's other mother leave him little to crow about

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Pop busies himself organising a christening while awaiting the birth of his first grandchild - and still finds time to cast a beady eye over the contents of an elderly widow's home. Whimsical rural drama, starring David Jason, Pam Ferris, Philip Franks and Catherine Zeta-Jones

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Louisa tries to raise some money by selling homemade food, which attracts the attention of another Englishman. However, a former lover threatens the family's idyllic existence. Gerry comes up with a plan to breed otters, Leslie accidentally shoots Roger, and Margo considers becoming a nun. Return of the drama series based on Gerald Durrell's books, starring Keeley Hawes

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A recently released ex-convict who served time for the rape of a local girl becomes the target of a hate campaign - prompting Rob to point the finger of suspicion at the victim's family. The bobby is shocked when old acquaintance DS Rachel Dawson arrives in Aidensfield on the trail of an escaped prisoner, while Peggy accidentally knocks down an old friend with her car. Jonathan Kerrigan stars

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Dingles take Zak to meet his birthday present. Marlon hears Nigel Hibbert is coming to the tearooms. Kim is disappointed when Steve does not give her the video

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon confronts Butch about the rock that was thrown through the caravan window. Steve puts the video in a safety deposit box, and Kim asks him to move in with her

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gerry keeps Liz, Jim and Andy at gunpoint, and the neighbours are stunned when a gunshot comes from number 11. Des and Samantha go to the airfield to do their parachute jump

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jack enjoys looking after Brad but Vera feels Tricia takes advantage of him too much. Alf takes his driving test, and Fiona rows with Alan for putting Liz in danger

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A mischievous trickster finally gets his comeuppance when his body is found floating below the weir in Midsomer Deverell. The extent of his double life starts to emerge when three family friends and a long-lost niece produce wills claiming his fortune, and his collection of erotic photographs from the 1960s gives Barnaby and Jones the key to the tangled relationships and feuds blighting the family

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Mischievous artist Harry Field, who specialises in preparing bogus coats of arms for gullible American tourists, is murdered - and Morse takes a personal interest in finding the culprit. But as investigations progress, he discovers the victim was not quite the lovable rogue he initially appeared. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately, Geraldine James and Freddie Jones

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin's GMC report requires he passes three refresher courses which will then decide whether he is deemed fit to practice, starting with phlebotomy. Meanwhile, Louisa focuses on her new career as a child and adolescent counsellor. Much to Bert's dismay, Al hires Caitlin, and confesses to his accidental proposal

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Shaun Evans directs this episode, set against the backdrop of the first moon landings in 1969. The detective investigates the deaths of an astrophysicist and his girlfriend in a tragic car accident as the rest of the world eagerly awaits news from Apollo 11. When he begins to suspect foul play, Endeavour enlists Thursday's help in getting to the truth, visiting the observatory where the dead man worked and discovering the possibility that he was not the intended victim. The case is complicated further when the dead scientist is revealed to have been part of a mysterious cult-like group

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: With Violet gone, Sidney loses himself in drink. After a heavy whiskey session leaves him without his jacket - and little memory of the night before - he discovers to his horror that he was the last person to see a young woman alive. As he struggles to remember her final words, Geordie grows concerned - both for the murdered girl, so callously abandoned outside a local slum, and for his friend's troubled state of mind. James Norton stars, with Robson Green, Tessa Peake-Jones, Al Weaver and Kacey Ainsworth

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford sleuth investigates a double mystery connected to the local Greek community - the death of a restaurant chef and the disappearance of a baby - and wonders whether an academic event attended by some of the university's leading classical scholars could shed light on the case. Mystery, starring John Thaw and Kevin Whately, with Jan Harvey, Martin Jarvis and James Hazeldine

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar is asked to take a diamond to Amsterdam for recutting - but crooks are determined to get their hands on it by any means necessary. Classic adventure, guest starring TP McKenna and Terence Rigby

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Part one of two. Robin and the outlaws leave Sherwood to defend a distant village from a band of phantom horsemen known as the Hounds of Lucifer, who terrorise the countryside on the orders of a powerful coven ruled by Morgwyn of Ravenscar. Guest starring Rula Lenska

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The unlikely duo investigate a case of caviar smuggling that led to murder. Feature-length episode of the detective thriller, starring Glynis Barber and Michael Brandon

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 investigates a judge's death and finds a connection with a deadly terrorist group of young middle-class drop-outs that has declared war on the legal system. On catching one of its number, Bodie and Doyle learn of a bomb due to explode in a courthouse. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The university branch of a bank is robbed, and though Regan and the Flying Squad catch most of the gang a known killer and his sidekick remain inside holding the manager and two women hostage. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar is persuaded to shadow a defecting civil servant who has been duped into carrying confidential papers to East Germany. Guest starring Ronald Hines

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Part two of two. Robert of Huntingdon assumes the mantle of Robin Hood as the re-formed band of outlaws resolves to rescue Marion from Clun. Fantasy drama, starring Jason Connery, with Ray Winstone, Judi Trott and Phil Davis

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: When the Ministry is broken into by an apparently invisible man, it seems a secret formula has fallen into the hands of an organisation run by Soviet Intelligence. Light-hearted action, starring Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur celebrates a reunion with old army pal Yorkie. However, after a particularly hard drinking session the visitor loses both his trousers and his bearings, leaving it up to Terry to track him down before his wife is made aware of the situation. Brian Glover guest stars, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Cowley and the team are confused by a chain of events that involves lethal narcotics, a series of killings and a drug addict. As they piece the clues together, Bodie and Doyle realise someone has a plan to flood the public water supply with lethal hallucenogenic drugs. Drama, starring Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Two former cellmates attempt to throw a suspicious Regan off their trail by pretending that they have fallen out and that one has murdered the other. Maureen Lipman guests stars, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Five bed specialists answer questions on subjects including Blue Peter, capital cities and Robert De Niro films, then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money. Quiz, hosted by Warwick Davis

programme.title: Griff's Great Australian Adventure
programme.desc: Comedian, actor and travel enthusiast Griff Rhys Jones boards the trains of Australia to explore Down Under, covering thousands of miles from surfers' beaches to dusty outback. On the first leg he journeys from Perth to Kalgoorlie on board the Indian Pacific, discovering Western Australia's riches, and asking - what is a sandgroper?

programme.title: The Bourne Identity (2002)
programme.desc: A fishing boat crew plucks a man out of the sea with two bullet wounds in his back and a safety-deposit number sewn into his skin - but absolutely no memory of who he is or how he got there. In the search for his true identity, he is pursued by assassins - but his skill at evading them suggests his own past is far from straightforward. Thriller, starring Matt Damon, Franka Potente, Chris Cooper, Clive Owen and Brian Cox

Crime comedy, starring Russell Crowe and Ryan Gosling

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: An antique necklace and a conspiracy of desperate men drag the duo into the shady world of gambling. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur loses a fortune in cash when his wine supplier is mugged and the money he entrusted is stolen. To add insult to injury the dodgy entrepreneur becomes the prime suspect for the attack, leading him and Terry on a mission to prove his innocence. George Cole stars

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle investigate the murder of a prostitute, but their only clues are a pornographic film and a Eastern bloc-backed plot to blackmail a prominent politician tipped to become a future prime minister. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Suspected felon Billy Medhurst returns from Spain, and Regan determines to prove his involvement in an earlier robbery in which a Sweeney office was shot and left permanently disabled. Police drama, starring John Thaw, Dennis Waterman and Anthony Heaton

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts the quiz, in which five old school friends from Middlesex answer questions about top 10 lists then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole takes a wild ride through Gran Canaria, and visits the Morgan factory to learn about their iconic three wheelers and what they are like to ride. The presenters also track down a rare 1970s Chopper to restore

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: James Bond achieves his '00' status and is dispatched on the trail of Le Chiffre, an international criminal financing terrorist organisations around the world. Bond's investigation leads to a casino in Montenegro, where he takes part in a high-stakes poker game in a bid to bankrupt Le Chiffre and put an end to his plans. Spy thriller, directed by Martin Campbell and starring Daniel Craig in his first outing as 007, with Eva Green, Mads Mikkelsen, Judi Dench and Giancarlo Giannini

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink arranges a date for Daphne with his new radio station manager - unaware he is gay. Comedy, guest starring Eric Lutes, with Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to prepare himself for the demands of fatherhood - but soon realises that carrying a 10lb bag of flour around the city streets is no substitute for a real baby. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon cannot contain his jealousy when he hears that his university colleague Bert has won a prestigious fellowship with an impressive grant. Elsewhere, Howard finds an old remote-controlled toy he made in the past, but the rest of the group do not seemed to be too impressed by it. Stephen Hawking guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny do their best to divide up all their possessions into two separate households, but tension ensues. Raj and Stuart compete to become indispensable to Howard and Bernadette as the baby's arrival looms. Christopher Lloyd (Back to the Future) guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's attempts to celebrate her birthday with an intimate night at home are interrupted by the news that Bernadette has gone into labour. However, it transpires that Howard, Raj and Stuart may have rushed the expectant mother to the hospital too early, with Raj having difficulty keeping the gender of the unborn child a secret

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is persuaded to go undercover to win the trust of Fat Tony as part of an FBI operation to bring the mobster down after an incident involving recycling responsibilities and bribery. With the voice of Jon Hamm (Mad Men)

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer talk to Jarvis Cocker, Tom Allen, McFly, Kylie Minogue and AJ Odudu. Plus, there is music from Jax Jones, who is in the studio to perform I Miss U

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Tension between Springfield Elementary's fourth and fifth graders spills over during a dodgeball game, leading Bart to arrange a fight with a fellow pupil. Marge gets back in touch with three friends she fell out with years ago, but she soon realises why they went their separate ways

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe achieves massive success when he turns the tavern into a gay bar, but keeps his hetrosexuality a secret to remain in his new clientele's favour. However, the decision backfires when the pub's new regulars encourage him to run for office and become Springfield's first openly gay councilman. Meanwhile, Principal Skinner falls for a new music teacher. Guest starring Kristen Wiig (Bridesmaids) and Alyson Hannigan (How I Met Your Mother)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes obsessed with a father-son relationship in a 1980s sitcom, using it as a source of inspiration to deal with Bart's hankering for a must-have mini-bike. However, when the youngster starts trading nuclear secrets with the Chinese government, Homer must find a new way to bring his son into line

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge notices grey hairs creeping through her blue dye and decides to embrace the shade like other middle-aged women. Homer becomes Moe's official 'wing man' in a bid to boost his friend's ailing love life

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Bart create a cartoon that is bought by a major animation studio and turned into a Golden Globe-nominated short. The pair are stunned to learn they have won the award, but Bart's joy is short-lived when Homer steals all the glory. Guest starring Ricky Gervais, Russell Brand, Nick Park, JB Smoove and Halle Berry

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present dessert week of the culinary competition. The signature round features a miniature cheesecake, while the technical challenge features a dish that dates back to the 17th century. Finally, for their showstoppers, the bakers must concoct a jelly art dessert cake constructed of delicate sponge. Judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith are on hand to sample the results and decide who will be Star Baker and who will be leaving the tent

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones is joined by David Coulthard and Mark Webber to present the 14th round of the season, which came from Intercity Istanbul Park. Red Bull's Sebastian Vettel and Webber were first and second respectively when this race was last held in 2011, a feat that Mercedes' Lewis Hamillton and Valtteri Bottas will have fancied their changes of emulating this time around

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Kelly from Essex would love a holiday home in the Black Sea coastal resort of Sunny Beach in Bulgaria. She's looking for an apartment on a complex, with plenty of facilities and a pool. With a budget of £25,000 and Kelly's best friend Angie coming along to help, will any of Scarlette Douglas's five fantastic properties turn out to be the perfect package?

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Sheila Hancock and broadcaster Gyles Brandreth tackle their first manual lock and some terrifyingly tight turns, but find themselves relaxing into life at 4mph, and marvel at how secret histories reveal themselves. They visit the Royal Gunpowder Mills, which built its own canal system to transport volatile ammunition - vital to Britain's success in both world wars

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge's to-do list is as long as ever, and with no guests, weddings or events at the chateau this year, they use their engineering and design skills to tackle some major projects. First on the list is transforming one of the old outbuildings into a supersized workshop for chateau-sized jobs

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes including Strictly Come Dancing, I'm a Celebrity... A Jungle Story, 24 Hours in Police Custody, Nigella's Cook, Eat, Repeat and Naked Attraction

programme.title: Rugby Union: Autumn Nations Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Ayo Akinwolere and guest Nolli Waterman present highlights from the opening round of the inaugural competition, featuring England v Georgia, Ireland v Wales, Italy v Scotland, and France v Fiji

programme.title: Don't Breathe (2016)
programme.desc: Three thieves break into the house of a blind Gulf War veteran, who is not as helpless as he seems and is also harbouring a dark secret. Horror, starring Stephen Lang, Jane Levy and Dylan Minnette

programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Victoria Coren Mitchell and Darren Harriott for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Flamangos restaurant in Whitehouse, New Jersey, where he tries to help the mother-and-daughter owners turn around their struggling business's fortunes. He faces a struggle because parent Adelle has a bad relationship with her staff and is disappointed by the resident chef, leaving Gordon with the added challenge of changing her attitude

programme.title: Nazi Treasure Hunters

programme.title: Fifteen to One

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The travellers have arrived in Bergamo, Italy, where Brendan entertains them with a fencing class, but one tourist gets daggers when he crosses a line at a circus class. With another of Brendan's Friday Twists in play, they're all walking a tightrope at the latest vote

programme.title: Kirstie's Fill Your House for Free

programme.desc: Rufus Hound is in Dictionary Corner for the words-and-numbers game, presented by Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: A put-upon Molly struggles to balance Thanksgiving preparations with making plans for the wedding, and decides to ask Mike for help. Comedy, starring Melissa McCarthy and Billy Gardell

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Bad news at work in the run-up to Christmas leaves Molly unable to get into the festive spirit. Comedy, starring Melissa McCarthy and Billy Gardell

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A friend of Frasier's drops in for a drink at the bar and when Diane learns he is an eminent marriage guidance counsellor, she asks him to assess her relationship with Sam. John Cleese guest stars

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam asks small-town boy Woody to chaperone his god-daughter Joyce round town now she has moved to Boston - but soon sees the disadvantages of his choice. Ted Danson and Woody Harrelson star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray impulsively agrees to start sharing the children's washing facilities so that Debra can have the bathroom to herself - but soon regrets acting so hastily. Ray Romano stars, with Patricia Heaton and Peter Boyle

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray happily befriend a new couple - whose annoying eight-year-old son Spencer insists on making a nuisance of himself. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier attend the closing of Martin's favourite bar, but are shocked to discover it is being demolished by a company they have invested in. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink makes a disparaging on-air remark about Seattle's weather, causing outrage across the city. He offers to host a charity benefit to make up for his careless words - but the event only leads to further trouble. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Greg Scott, CEO of clothing retailer New York & Company, disguises himself to go undercover among his own employees seeking ways to keep the business in vogue and increase profitability. He meets up with a sales associate, a fitting room stylist, a stocker and an assistant manager

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: A look at what happened after Gordon Ramsay headed to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he met husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who revealed a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faced the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company - and a media furore unfolded after the episode was broadcast

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Angie and Neelesh met 30 years ago on the London Underground, and now with retirement on the horizon they think the time is right to buy a holiday home in their favourite Spanish town of Estepona. The couple have their hearts set on a new build property and have asked Laura Hamilton to help find them the perfect one. Laura lines up various options for their maximum budget of £260,000, but will any impress them enough to make an offer?

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Phillip aims to transform three derelict rooms at Chateau de la Fare into the perfect bridal suite for his daughter Penny's wedding in three months' time

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When all the fast-food restaurants in Springfield start serving healthy meals, Homer turns to the last bastion of greasy food for comfort - and digs up some childhood memories. And Lisa must find a good news story when the future of her school radio station is in jeopardy

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Ste offers Jordan some home truths, and Mitchell encourages Martine to go on a date, renewing Toby's resentment towards his brother

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Rory Peck Awards
programme.desc: Nominees for the award onouring the freelance TV cameramen and women who bring the world's stories to the screen, beginning with a look at the work of finalist Sasha Joelle Achilli. She reveals how she focused on a single A&E doctor's world - at home and at work - to create an account of Europe's first devastating encounter with the Covid-19 virus

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: In the month when the worlds' leaders should have been gathering in Glasgow to tackle global warming, Sophie Morgan investigates the carbon footprint of the technology industry and tests some of the environmental claims of some of the biggest names in the tech world. She also recruits two families to keep a diary of their online habits and together they discover some shocking truths about the hidden cost of their online habits

programme.title: Food Unwrapped Investigates
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates the junk-food diets of children who are fussy eaters, visiting one of the largest studies into childhood eating habits in the world to find out what is reasonable to categorise as normal behaviour and when parents should seek help. She learns about a newly discovered eating disorder that has so far been largely undiagnosed and could be behind thousands of cases of fussy eating in the UK

programme.title: Lockdown Chaos: How the Government Lost Control
programme.desc: In July, the Prime Minister said he hoped life would be normal again by Christmas, but now most of the UK is under lockdown. What happened? Antony Barnett investigates the second wave of Covid-19, looking at how the government lost control and revealing new evidence about companies making millions from the pandemic

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Home County Cartel
programme.desc: Part one of two. The documentary focuses on the importation of huge quantities of Class A drugs, following the work of covert detectives from the Eastern Region Special Operation Unit. A consignment weighing more than 100kg has been intercepted while being imported into the UK from Europe. To reveal who is behind this, an undercover operation is authorised to closely monitor the shipment, using audio and visual equipment, as it travels to its final destination at a farm in rural Hertfordshire

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Home County Cartel
programme.desc: Part two of two. The covert team tries to find the true identity of Jaguar Palace, as well as the evidence to link the suspect directly to the drug-importing conspiracy. The detectives begin a nerve-shredding wait for the criminal network to set up its lucrative operation again, and stand ready to strike against the ringleaders when it does

programme.title: Educating Greater Manchester
programme.desc: Year eight student Rani decides to play a Valentine's prank on his best friend Jack, but the strength of their friendship is put to the test after an incident in the playground. Meanwhile, the search to find the new head girl concludes and the winner is finally revealed to staff and students, and year 11 pupil Chelci has a falling out with best friend, Cheyenne

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice

There's also extra footage and photos of the curious so-called cakes that eager amateurs have been creating at home. With Tom Allen

The first two challenges see them pushed to come up with a unique recipe involving apples and their own take on spaghetti bolognese. After the first two challenges, one contestant will be eliminated and the remaining two must prepare brunch for judges Heston Blumenthal, Niklas Ekstedt and Carla Hall

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.desc: Frankie Howerd's career highlights are celebrated in this documentary narrated by long-time fan David Walliams. Showcasing Frankie's best bits, it's a journey through the life of the British comedian whose career in showbusiness spanned six decades. It features long forgotten footage, rare performances and personal photographs

programme.title: Paul Merton's Heroes of Comedy
programme.desc: The comedian explores what motivated the world's greatest comics, how and why they became successful, and what inspired their best moments and characters. programme.title: Funny Women
programme.desc: Celebrity friends and fans, including James Dreyfus, Wayne Sleep, Christopher Biggins, Michelle Visage and Melissa Manchester, pay homage to the actress and singer. This documentary traces Bette Midler's life from her childhood in Hawaii, her residency at a gay New York bathhouse accompanied on piano by a young Barry Manilow, through an astonishing Hollywood career to a recent record-breaking run on Broadway in Hello Dolly. The life of this pint-sized powerhouse is illustrated with rarely seen archive

programme.title: The Secret Life of Puppies
programme.desc: Two puppies are trained to jump in and out of helicopters so they can work in the African bush, tracking down poachers hunting rhinos and elephants for their horns and ivory. In North Wales, a border collie puppy learns the basic skills of sheep herding, including judging distance and self-control, and a deaf dalmatian cross learns how to sense movement through the ground and air

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter carefully examines a boar that is off its food, a rescue dog brought over from Spain undergoes surgery on a painful eye condition, and Rodney invests in an unusual device for administering medical treatment to his sheep - but neither he nor Julian know how it works and the sheep seem less than keen. A rare cattle breeder waits for the pregnancy test results on his Jack Russell

programme.title: The Great Plague: Outbreak
programme.desc: Xand van Tulleken, Raksha Dave and John Sergeant trace the spread of the Great Plague of 1665 week by week and discover parallels with the coronavirus. In the first episode, the epidemic is traced back to its source in the parish of St Giles in the Fields, now at the heart of London's theatre district. The programme also examines the symptoms of the disease and uncovers new research into the plague bacteria that could overthrow accepted ideas about how the infection was spread

programme.title: The Missing Evidence
programme.desc: The identity of one of history's most notorious serial killers has generated many theories over the years since the three-month period in 1888 when a number of women were murdered on the streets of Whitechapel. Journalist Christer Holmgren believes that he has found a suspect who can not only be linked directly to one of the murders, but also whose daily routine could be consistent with all the other deaths. Having studied the case for more than three decades, his focus eventually fell on a witness called Charles Cross, whose real name turned out to be Charles Allen Lechmere, and he found a mass of incriminating evidence

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen (2013)
programme.desc: A secret service operative is reassigned from Presidential Protection after a tragic accident. As he prepares to leave his assignment, terrorists take control of the White House and hold the president hostage. The agent is trapped in the building, and uses his inside knowledge to rescue the head of state. Action thriller, starring Gerard Butler, Aaron Eckhart and Morgan Freeman
