programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Mother's Day (2016)
programme.desc: As Mother's Day approaches, an array of seemingly unconnected characters all find themselves reconsidering their relationships with their mothers and what motherhood mean to them. Garry Marshall's ensemble comedy in which various families go through dramatic turning points, starring Julia Roberts, Jennifer Aniston, Kate Hudson, Jason Sudeikis, Jennifer Garner and Timothy Olyphant

programme.title: Time Bandits (1981)
programme.desc: A bemused schoolboy is escorted on a bizarre journey through time by a group of larcenous dwarfs. His adventures lead him to encounters with various characters from history - but none of them are quite what he had imagined. Terry Gilliam's fantasy comedy, starring Craig Warnock, David Rappaport, John Cleese, Michael Palin, Sean Connery, Ian Holm, Ralph Richardson and David Warner

programme.title: Robin and Marian (1976)
programme.desc: Outlaw Robin Hood returns to England after the Crusades and goes in search of his beloved Marian, who is now an abbess, and crosses swords once again with old enemy the Sheriff of Nottingham. Medieval adventure, starring Sean Connery, Audrey Hepburn, Robert Shaw, Nicol Williamson, Ronnie Barker, Denholm Elliott and Richard Harris

programme.title: The Man Who Would Be King (1975)
programme.desc: Two British soldiers in 19th-century India travel to an unexplored land, where one of them fools the natives into believing he is a god. However, his growing delusions of grandeur put him at loggerheads with his comrade-in-arms. Adventure based on the Rudyard Kipling story, directed by John Huston, starring Sean Connery, Michael Caine, Saeed Jaffrey, Christopher Plummer and Shakira Caine

programme.title: Taken (2008)
programme.desc: An American teenager travelling through Europe is abducted by a gang of sex traffickers. However, what the kidnappers do not realise is that the girl's father is a former CIA agent, who employs all his old skills as he searches for the criminals and tries to rescue his daughter. Thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Famke Janssen and Maggie Grace

programme.title: Escape Plan (2013)
programme.desc: An expert takes a contract from the CIA to test a maximum security prison by trying to break out of it, but he soon discovers he has been duped and that his captors intend him to stay inside for ever. He hatches a plan to escape, but to succeed he will need the help of a long-term convict - who wants his own freedom in return for assistance. Thriller, with Sylvester Stallone and Arnold Schwarzenegger

programme.title: Plastic (2014)
programme.desc: A gang of credit card thieves accidentally steals from a gangster, who demands to be paid back 10 times over. The leader of the group comes up with a plan to carry out a daring jewellery heist in Miami, but his scheme is undermined as his team begin to turn on each other. Fact-based crime thriller, starring Ed Speleers, Will Poulter and Alfie Allen

programme.title: Random Acts
programme.desc: Vacant Base by Isaac Tomiczek, exploring the influence of clubbing on modern British multiculturalism

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Deepa Shastri meets conceptual artist Louise Stern to find out why she left the safety of her Deaf 'bubble' in America for the London art scene, where no one knew how to sign

programme.title: Retreat, Hell! (1952)
programme.desc: US Marines have to battle their way through a frozen mountain pass despite dwindling supplies and continual enemy attacks. Korean War drama, made while the conflict was still raging, starring Frank Lovejoy, Anita Louise, Richard Carlson and Russ Tamblyn

programme.title: Only the Valiant (1951)
programme.desc: A tough cavalry officer selects six unlikely comrades to undertake a vital mission to defend an isolated fort against marauding Apaches. His men's initial hostility soon turns to respect, however, as they realise his wily ways will see them through the conflict. Western adventure based on a novel by Charles Marquis Warren, starring Gregory Peck, Barbara Payton, Ward Bond and Lon Chaney Jr

programme.title: Two Thousand Women (1944)
programme.desc: Female prisoners struggle to cope with living in a German internment camp, but find common cause in making life difficult for their captors. When three British airmen are shot down over the prison, they keep them hidden from the Germans while plotting a way to smuggle them out safely. Second World War comedy, with Phyllis Calvert, Flora Robson, Patricia Roc and Renee Houston

programme.title: Pony Express (1953)
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill Cody and Wild Bill Hickok work on establishing an east-west route for the pioneering mail service that will allow messages to be sent from Missouri to California in 10 days. However, they have to contend with saboteurs planning to prevent California becoming part of the Union. Western, starring Charlton Heston, Forrest Tucker, Rhonda Fleming and Jan Sterling

programme.title: Eye in the Sky (2015)
programme.desc: Colonel Katherine Powell's mission to wipe out a terrorist cell in Kenya is complicated when a girl enters the blast radius of the intended drone strike. Powell has to decide between sacrificing the girl's life or letting the terrorists flee to carry out more atrocities. Thriller, starring Helen Mirren, Alan Rickman and Aaron Paul

programme.title: Central Intelligence (2016)
programme.desc: Action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson as a one-time geek who suffered constant humiliation at high school but grew up to be a lethal CIA agent. But when he is targeted by his own organisation, he comes home for a high school reunion, where he enlists the help of the former campus tough guy - now a meek accountant - who very quickly wonders what he has got himself into. Co-starring Kevin Hart and Amy Ryan

programme.title: Shoplifters (2018)
programme.desc: A poverty-stricken group living in Tokyo makes ends meet by shoplifting. One night they take a troubled little girl under their wing, and when police start investigating her disappearance, the family attempts to hide her from the authorities. Drama, starring Lily Franky, Sakura Ando and Mayu Matsuoka. In Japanese

programme.title: Like Father, Like Son (2013)
programme.desc: A hard-working family man discovers that his six-year-old son was accidentally mixed up with another baby at birth. As he considers how to resolve the situation, the devotion of his wife and the other family involved to the children they have raised makes him wonder if he has been a good father. Drama, starring Masaharu Fukuyama and Machiko Ono. In Japanese

programme.title: The Spy in Black (1939)
programme.desc: A German spy falls for an apparently sympathetic schoolteacher during a First World War mission, unaware the object of his affections is in fact an English double agent, a situation that threatens to jeopardise an operation to destroy the British fleet in the Orkneys in 1917. Powell and Pressburger's romantic drama, starring Conrad Veidt, Valerie Hobson and Marius Goring

programme.title: The Great Sioux Massacre (1965)
programme.desc: A corrupt senator coaxes Colonel Custer out of retirement with the prospect of presidential office, and the soldier tries to further his political ambitions by wresting control of the current military campaign from its commanding officer, culminating in his last stand at the Battle of the Little Bighorn. Western, with Philip Carey, Joseph Cotten, Darren McGavin and Julie Sommars

programme.title: Pimpernel Smith (1941)
programme.desc: An unassuming English professor working on an archaeological dig in Germany leads a double life helping enemies of the Nazi regime escape the country. Second World War adventure based on The Scarlet Pimpernel, directed by and starring Leslie Howard, with Francis L Sullivan, Mary Morris, Hugh McDermott, Raymond Huntley and Manning Whiley

programme.title: Two Rode Together (1961)
programme.desc: The desperate relatives of people captured by Comanches many years before put pressure on the US military to bring them home. The army hires a cynical frontier marshal, who agrees to negotiate their release in return for a commission. But the townsfolk are forced to face some grim truths when he returns with just one unrecognisable captive. John Ford's Western, with James Stewart, Richard Widmark and Shirley Jones

programme.title: Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer (2007)
programme.desc: The super-powered team takes on a mysterious alien who has been sent by his planet-eating master to prepare Earth for obliteration. While the four heroes try to find a way to foil its plans, an old enemy returns, intent on seizing the extraterrestrial's power. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Michael Chiklis, Chris Evans and Jessica Alba, with the voice of Laurence Fishburne

programme.title: Hitman: Agent 47 (2015)
programme.desc: The latest in a long line of genetically engineered clones bred to be the perfect assassin takes on a mission that strikes close to home. A corporation intends to use the technology that created him to build an army of superhuman killers. As the assassin fights to bring them down, he uncovers the dark secrets surrounding his origin. Action thriller, starring Rupert Friend, Hannah Ware and Zachary Quinto

programme.title: Little Fockers (2010)
programme.desc: Nurse Greg is now the proud father of twins, but has yet to earn the respect of his wife's stern father after 10 years of marriage. The couple invite both sides of their extended family to the kids' birthday party, where Greg makes a desperate effort to finally prove his worth to his father-in-law. Comedy sequel, with Ben Stiller, Robert De Niro, Owen Wilson and Dustin Hoffman

programme.title: I Wish (2011)
programme.desc: A 12-year-old boy lives with his divorced mother, while his brother lives with his father in a different part of the country. When a bullet train line is built connecting the two towns, he starts to believe that when the first trains pass each other, a miracle will occur - which he hopes will reunite his family. Drama, starring real-life brothers Koki and Ohshiro Maeda. In Japanese

programme.title: Random Acts
programme.desc: A collection of exciting new films from cutting-edge black filmmakers, this time featuring Rikki Henry's short film Venus/Mars

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. The McQueens' blackmailer summons the family for an urgent announcement, and Juliet attempts to throw Jordan of the scent of who betrayed him

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

Nightwatchman Larry tries to retrieve it, only to find the contents of the world's largest museum have been reanimated, including a pharaoh determined to take over the world. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Amy Adams, Owen Wilson and Steve Coogan

Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Andy Serkis, Jason Clarke and Gary Oldman

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: The vampire sleuth and his friends travel to Lorne's home world of Pylea, where demons are the dominant race and humans are traded as cattle. Here, they plan to rescue Cordelia from hostile villagers who believe she is cursed. Supernatural drama, starring David Boreanaz

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A 71-year-old widow goes on her first date in 51 years with a retired CEO who enjoys life in the fast lane, and a woman with a liking for James Corden is shocked to discover her date looks just like him. A man caring for his sick mother goes on his first ever blind date with a law student. Both are looking for something long-term, but his inexperience threatens to trip him up. Finally, a single mother is less than impressed by a market trader in his best suit - until she discovers he enjoys working out at the gym

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj feels upset about not being in a relationship, so Penny sets out to find a date and introduces him to a girl he can actually talk to. They hit it off, but when it becomes apparent he has been buying her expensive gifts, his friends suspect she is only interested in his wealth

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's old adversary Wil Wheaton returns and invites everyone to a house-warming party. Leonard is eager to go, but Sheldon threatens to shun him if he attends. However, he soon changes his mind when he finds out that Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Brent Spiner will also be there

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted runs into Zoey at a black-tie fundraiser for the Natural History Museum and sees a different side to her when he meets her husband, the Captain. Later, Marshall argues with Lily over his career path, and Barney makes a shocking discovery. Comedy, guest starring Kyle MacLachlan

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted decides to head home early from a night out to get ready for a Thanksgiving feast, but is furious when he discovers his friends had thrilling adventures after he left - and his misery only deepens when he finds out they also bonded with Zoey in his absence. Guest starring Jorge Garcia (Lost)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Inspired by the Karate Kid films, Adam and the other Adam Goldberg decide to face off in a karate match to settle their long-running feud once and for all. Later, Barry and Adam ask Uncle Marvin for some martial arts training - but the only thing they learn is how to do his cleaning

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The presenter continues his look back at some of the best builds over five series of Amazing Spaces. This time he turns his attention to some of the most innovative and eccentric caravan and campervan builds he's ever seen - from a tiny Italian tuk tuk campervan to a trailer tent caravan clad in old CDs, and a tiny 1950s ambulance converted to sleep a family of six, plus their dog. There is also an Airstream caravan converted into the ultimate party pad, and a look at George's own high-tech holiday home in the Lake District

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The presenter focuses his attention on how nature and architecture can work harmoniously together in terms of cabin accommodation. He considers a mountain-top ski lodge in Italy only accessible by helicopter, a hobbit-inspired cob house in Oxfordshire built for only £150, and a concrete dome-home built under a man-made hill in a Texan hurricane valley. George also reflects on his own wilderness cabin that he built in the Sussex woodlands

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect reflects on the incredible things it's possible to build in the humble back garden, from a cliff-top stargazing retreat to a glorious garden room made from a derelict swimming pool, and the country's most multi-functional shed. George also looks back on his own garden build, where he and Will Hardie transformed his dilapidated garage and unloved lawn into the ultimate garden family studio

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Theatre-lover Claire Flatt hosts the first party in Ipswich, where one guest makes a big impression by arriving in a limousine. Claire prepares Thai fishcakes and Princess Jasmine rice, as well as her signature dish 'chaos cake', in the hope of winning the £1,000 prize at the end of the week

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Millwall fan Kerrie Pankhurst hosts the second dinner party in Ipswich, which she decides to give a football theme - but the mood turns sour when one of the guests insults her team. Kerrie's decision to serve scallops and chorizo as her starter also does not go down well with DJ Dave James

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Magician David J Marks hosts the third dinner party in Ipswich, and hopes to win over Kerrie Pankhurst after offending her the previous night. His salmon starter impresses all the diners except Dave James, who explains all the gruesome things he would rather do than eat the fish, so the host lightens the mood by showing off his ventriloquist dummies and laying on a magic show

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Dave James hosts the fourth dinner party from Ipswich and asks his guests to attend dressed as pop stars. Claire Flatt and Nicki Yucel are suspicious about his celebrity connections, and there is trouble when the diners discover Dave obtained help with the cooking

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Speed-dating expert Nicki Yucel hosts the final dinner party in Ipswich, and is determined to cultivate a romantic atmosphere. As the evening progresses, Kerrie Pankhurst reveals her feelings for another diner, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Shoes in Durham, where landlord Billy Gowland and partner Debbie Nelson hope their footwear-themed pub and B&B is the right fit for their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Biggin Hall Hotel in Derbyshire, owner James Moffat and partner Annie Larner hope the B&Bers will fall for the rural charm of their 17th-century farmhouse

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit the group head to Forest Garden Shovelstrode in East Sussex, where hosts Charles and Lisa Hooper hope the guests buy into their woodland retreat

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mother and son Fiona and James Milligan welcome the guests to Derby Manor Hotel and Restaurant in Bournemouth, where the ostentatious decor gets mixed reactions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. The Shoes is up first and hosts Billy Gowland and his partner Debbie Nelson find out if their budget rooms have proved too basic for the group. Next, James Moffat and his partner Annie Larner from Biggin Hall Hotel want to clear up their issues with Billy and Debbie. As the third hosts, Charles and Lisa Hooper from yurt glamp-site Forest Garden Shovelstrode confront their low scores from James. Finally, Fiona and James from the Derby Manor Hotel and Restaurant make accusations of nitpicking and double standards

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Carpenter Wes Leaver hosts the first party in east Kent, hoping his science theme will be enough to win him the £1,000 prize at the end of the week. However, the 34-year-old faces competition from estate agent Alexandra Austin, beautician Emma Phillips, dog-lover Sally Parry and fancy-dress enthusiast Stephen Drew

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Alexandra Austen hosts the second party of the week in east Kent, hoping to impress her guests with pan-European cuisine. However, the meal gets off to a shaky start when Sally Parry is forced to confront her fear of beans, while Stephen Drew struggles with a goat's cheese parcel. Alexandra's decision to serve veal also proves controversial, and it soon becomes clear two of the guests are not enjoying each other's company

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beautician Emma Phillips hosts the third dinner party in east Kent. Her main course is described by one diner as a pet on a plate, and Alexandra Austin declares the menu to be rather odd. Meanwhile, Stephen Drew and Wes Leaver enjoy an impromptu beauty treatment together

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog-lover Sally Parry hosts the fourth dinner party in east Kent, hoping to impress her guests with a pink-themed night, including posh pink food and table decorations. However, Sally and Emma have a heated argument, Alex misbehaves and Wes falls asleep

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Flamboyant Stephen Drew hosts the final dinner party in east Kent, and has designed a menu that will allow him to spend time entertaining his guests. With an Absolutely Fabulous theme, a few of the diners are expecting a Mardi Gras vibe, but he has different ideas for the night - before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Grand Designs: The Street
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows two more self-build plots in Oxfordshire. Engineers Sean and Dianna are building an 'upside-down' house, with bedrooms downstairs so they can enjoy the views from their open-plan first floor. But an unexpected offer to work abroad upsets their carefully laid plans. Meanwhile, Garrie is building the largest house on the street, packed with expensive technology for wife Sue, who is disabled and has mental health issues

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: In the Lakes, Paul's fun day ghyll-scrambling abruptly ends after he gets a bout of serious chest pain. Meanwhile, Falmouth Coastguard Rescue Teams help Yvonne after she has a fall on a narrow cliffside path

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow 54-year-old Richard, who arrives at St George's hospital suffering symptoms of a suspected stroke. Meanwhile, 76-year-old Peter turns up in A&E with a severe head injury, covered in blood, but it's not clear what happened to him

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Three young men from different walks of life are brought in to the A&E department of St George's Hospital in London, including 17-year-old Shea, who has serious stab wounds and is sent to a high dependency unit. Fellow 17-year-old Bob arrives after impaling his leg on a fence while taking a shortcut home from his boys' school, and 33-year-old James is brought in by ambulance after fainting at home

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Loudonville, Ohio, to rescue Landoll's Mohican Castle, a custom-built, multimillion-dollar hotel set in an 1100-acre woodland estate. Co-owner Marta is struggling, having been left with the entire burden of running such a large establishment alone. Can Gordon persuade her son Jimmy to finally take the reins and turn this business around before the family legacy is destroyed?

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: In the Lakes, Paul's fun day ghyll-scrambling abruptly ends after he gets a bout of serious chest pain. Meanwhile, Falmouth Coastguard Rescue Teams help Yvonne after she has a fall on a narrow cliffside path

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of pioneering veterinary practice Fitzpatrick Referrals in Surrey, where orthopaedic-neuro veterinary surgeon Noel Fitzpatrick and his team help some of the nation's hardest-to-cure pets using cutting-edge procedures. A three-year-old Newfoundland dog needs surgery for its bent front legs, and a long-haired Chihuahua requires a total hip replacement. A woman brings in her German shepherd, which has developed a painful degenerative spinal disease requiring treatment

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The cleric tries to nurture Chris, the hot favourite to win the King of the Sheep festival, back to top form after he is left shaken by a terrifying encounter. Meanwhile, Dougal becomes convinced Craggy Island is being terrorised by a monster

programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt aims to solve the age-old mystery of how to smoothly extract ketchup from a bottle - by running across a pond of custard

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin helps Londoner Trevor, who wants to buy a property on the Maltese island of Gozo and has a budget of £150,000 to spend

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien turn an old, unloved filing cabinet into a valuable and desirable storage unit and convert a Bakelite voltmeter into a retro Bluetooth speaker

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more gems hidden among unwanted possessions, trying to make a profit from church organ pipes and old leather sports car seats

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Donna McDougal's search for the armour in the lake continues. Tim and Krys, with the help of Tim's brother Ben, continue in their struggle to get the attic converted in time for the first guests of the season. Dick and his mother-in-law Jenny struggle with preparing and freezing 227kg of pork, before attempting to turn the final 2kg into salamis

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets self-building duo Caroline and Chris in south London, who hope to build an urban marvel on a very tight plot

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jon and Julia Shorrock host the first round of the B&B competition from their four-star Derwent House in West Sussex. The guests are split by gender to sample the area, with the men firing machine guns at a shooting range and the women relaxing at a spa - but a carpeted bathroom and shower without hot water raise questions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Peter and Sharron Sorsky invite their fellow competitors to Kirkby Park B&B in Liverpool, but the presence of a security camera on the outside of the house leaves one guest feeling uneasy. Room inspections uncover all manner of unsightly problems, but a tour of nearby Knowsley Safari Park gives the contestants a chance to enjoy themselves

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Andy and Julian Banner-Price host the competition at their expensive B&B Plas Dinas Country House in Snowdonia, giving their new guests the priciest rooms. Peter and Sharron Sorsky are still reeling from their feedback forms and immediately find fault with the accommodation, and the group is taken to wash bedding the old-fashioned way at the local slate museum

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Annette McAnespie welcomes the group to Hazelwood Farm in Crayke, North Yorkshire, for the final B&B visit. The initial impressions are favourable and Peter and Jon begin to bond for the first time during a mosaic class, but not everyone feels up to the planned activity of a cycling tour

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time at Annette McAnespie's farm in Crayke, North Yorkshire, to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances, before the week's winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Spider monkey Kiara becomes a mother for the first time, but keepers worry that the baby is becoming weak as Kiara appears to be more interested in playing with the other monkeys than taking on maternal responsibilities. Meanwhile, baby capybara Henry enjoys having the attention of all the female capybaras, and Babirusa Sausu moves from paddock to paddock to mate with various females

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: In the Pays de la Loire, twenty-something couple Billy and Gwendoline want to open their chateau as a wedding location, but it's not going to plan as the chimney seems to have caught fire. Near Dijon, Clive and Tanith run an upmarket chateau hotel but need to win over the locals, so they put on an open day. Meanwhile, sisters Tanya and Marian prepare to visit their chateau in the Loire Valley. They need to get it ready for the first guests of the summer in less than a week's time, but are faced with everything from dead flies to leaking swimming pools

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Peter Maddison meets Tabitha and Chris, who have purchased 120 acres of rainforest in Toolangi and are building a farmhouse that will be completely off grid

programme.title: Grand Designs: The Street
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the last of the self-build projects as husband and wife Godfrey and Pauline seek to downsize from their family home and commission a modular, factory-built home. Once the building arrives on site, it takes just two weeks to be assembled and is ready to move into - only for a problem with the finance to leave them technically homeless. Can they find a solution or will their dreams turn to dust?

programme.title: Building Giants
programme.desc: The construction of the Rose Fitzgerald Kennedy Bridge over the River Barrow in Co Kilkenny, which has two spans of more than 750ft and stands on a purpose-built artificial island

programme.title: Secrets of the Superfactories
programme.desc: The inner workings of cars, chips, toys and toilets as the curtains are pulled back at Maserati, Frito-Lay, Bandai and Armitage Shanks factories

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 79-year-old woman is airlifted to hospital after being involved in a road traffic collision, with consultants concerned that she may have life-threatening internal bleeding. Meanwhile, 80-year-old Mohammad has come to A&E after falling at home during a family Eid celebratory feast, and 56-year-old Russ is brought in after falling from a ladder while cutting back some trees at work

programme.title: Fatal Flight 447: Chaos in the Cockpit
programme.desc: The story of what really happened on June 1, 2009, when Air France Flight 447 from Rio de Janeiro to Paris plummeted into the Atlantic Ocean, killing all 228 passengers and crew. It remained a mystery how one of the world's most technologically advanced planes could seemingly just drop out of the sky, until a two-year search finally located the black-box recorders. This documentary reveals the scene on board the doomed airliner as the pilots struggled to understand the catastrophe unfolding before them, and asks what lessons have been learnt from the disaster

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words and numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Victoria Coren Mitchell going up against guest captain Lee Mack and Bob Mortimer. Alex Horne and the Horne Section join Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A man travels through the night to bring his much-loved Dobermann down from Cumbria to see orthopaedic-neuro veterinary surgeon Noel Fitzpatrick about a diseased spinal cord. Can the professor and his staff bring the canine back to health? Other cases this week are a cocker spaniel rushed in after being hit by a car and a rabbit that needs surgery for a broken ankle

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A compilation of some of the shows previous investigations. Kate heads to the Amazon rainforest to investigate rumours that the Brazil nuts on UK supermarket shelves are all radioactive. Meanwhile, Matt heads out on the streets to find out how the public feel about eating goat meat, and Jimmy takes to the skies above Israel to join the battle to protect the bell pepper crop from the Mediterranean fruit fly

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: North Londoners Veronica and Jude are looking for a holiday home in Costa de la Luz in southern Spain, so Laura Hamilton shows them five properties within their budget of £110,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole calls in a locksmith to bring a safe back from the scrapheap, and a ship's wheel is left in splinters when the presenter falls out with restorer Guy

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Max McMurdo travel the length of Britain seeking items to fix up, flog on and sell for profit. Max upcycles a brass propeller into a stylish table lamp, while Henry goes all Victorian with an old pond yacht

programme.title: Building the Dream

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Gill and Peter Tydie invite their fellow competitors to stay at the Victory in Mersea, Essex, a four-star B&B with 26 members of staff to run the bar, restaurant and accommodation. A trip to a local fishery gives one contestant an opportunity to annoy his peers, and the discovery of a hole in a bedsheet leaves the hosts feeling uneasy about their chances of success

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dave Botha hosts at his Butterfly Paragliding B&B on the Isle of Wight. Deborah Morrison and Wayne Bingham are unhappy they must sleep in a tepee in the garden and use an outdoor toilet, and claim they were served watery eggs and rubbery sausages for breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed

The hoteliers try to entertain their guests by inviting them to take part in an archery contest - which ends in accusations of unfair play

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. One of the hosts gets upset about large underpayments and a couple interrogate their guests about the criticism in their feedback, before the winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, keepers prepare for the difficult task of transporting giraffe Kidepo to a new zoo, and Kidepo's brother Narus is not making the move any easier. Meanwhile, silvery gibbon Alvin is keen to get close to his partner Tilu again, and after diving headfirst into an empty pool one too many times, keepers decide a trip to the vet is in order for caiman lizard Gary to see if there is an underlying problem. Elsewhere, dominant warthog Magnum is being challenged by fellow warthog Dobby, so keepers decide it is time to move Dobby to a zoo in Germany

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Billy, Gwendoline and Michael locate their heating problem, but it means that Billy - who's scared of height - has to repoint the chimney 20 metres up. Clive and Tanith get their hands dirty trying to work out what's stopped the fountain working at their hotel and Michelin-starred restaurant. Meanwhile, the clock's ticking for sisters Marian and Tanya as they try to sort out a winter's worth of problems

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Building an underground eco bunker that is self-sufficient, sleek and completely one of a kind, and that from the outside will look like a bush garden

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Andy Stakes and Jeanette Hardy, who are building a new house on top of a sheer cliff on the west coast of Scotland. The pair want to spend £250,000 on a two-bedroom, glass-fronted and earth-sheltered home for themselves and their two beloved Newfoundland dogs. However, construction on such an exposed site is fraught with danger and the pair face no end of problems throughout the build, and a last minute design change that begs the biggest question: even if Andy finishes the house, will Jeanette actually like it?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 14-year-old is rushed to St George's after falling head first over the handlebars of her bike and hitting her head, and doctors are concerned she may have caused serious damage. programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?

programme.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef embarks on a culinary journey by sea and land to explore the Far East's most diverse food cultures. He begins in Cambodia, where tourists are beginning to return after the fall of the Khmer Rouge regime. As well as discovering the joys of freshly caught swimmer crabs with green peppercorns, he learns how to cook the country's most famous dish - fish amok - and samples lok lak, made with marinated beef. He also visits the Angkor Wat temple and joins a rice barge to travel down the Mekong River

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Writer, actor, comedian and podcaster Adam Buxton accompanies Richard Ayoade on a voyage of discovery in Lisbon, the Portuguese capital city known for its decorative tiling and maritime history. Adam and Richard tackle it at break-neck speed in an electric rickshaw, visit a tinned-fish emporium, take the celebrated iron lift - the Elevador de Santa Justa - and listen to some fado, Lisbon's version of the blues. There's potent cherry liqueur for breakfast, a tram ride up a steep hillside and a trip to a doll hospital. The duo also pay a visit to Belem, home to Lisbon's famed custard tarts

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and comedy actor Jack Dee embark on a clock-conscious exploration of the Italian city, enjoying two days rich in humour, history, culture and pizza. The pair start with a guided tour on vintage Vespas amid the city's chaotic traffic, attend a pizza-making class and then head to the volcanic ruins of Herculaneum. Day two sees them visit the Isle of Capri and play the lottery using la smorfia, a local guide to the meaning of dreams

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Acclaimed chronicle of the Second World War, beginning with an account of Hitler's ascent to power at a time when the Germans were stricken by humiliating military defeat, runaway inflation and economic depression. The Nazi leader's promises of regained national pride and prosperity struck a chord with millions of ordinary citizens, and he was elected on a tidal wave of popular support. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Narrow Escapes of World War Two

programme.desc: The story of the 1936 Olympics held in Berlin, revealing how the games led to Nazi Germany gaining international praise as a nation that had triumphed following the Depression

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Hanbury Hall in Droitwich. Among the rarities brought in to be valued are a jacket designed by Peter Blake, which proves less valuable for being nibbled by a ferret, a nude painting and a sketch of Napoleon on his deathbed. Andy McConnell examines the oldest piece of glass he has seen in his career, and Fiona is challenged to spot a 2500-year-old Greek vessel among three fakes

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of the train operating company's drivers, managers, ticket inspectors and technicians along the route between London, south-west England and south Wales. In the first edition, Paddington's duty station manager Simon Jeffery has his customer service skills tested by several angry passengers who have been held up following a fire, while train manager Jodie deals with drunks on a late-night service from Swansea

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: A multi-billion-pound 32km super sewer under the streets of London, an early sewer system at the Palace of Knossos and a pivotal piece of tunnel boring equipment from the past

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A closer look at a sprawling Wild West ghost town that sits peaceful and abandoned in Montana, USA, but is still haunted by tales of murder, corruption and buried treasure

programme.title: Narrow Escapes of World War Two

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The months following prime minister Neville Chamberlain's declaration of war against Germany, in which the only casualties on the home front were those who had to endure the blackouts. programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels through Bohemia and Bavaria, beginning by exploring the art nouveau architecture of Czech Republic capital Prague. He then samples the sulphurous spa waters and wallows in peat and mud in Marianske Lazne, formerly known as Marienbad, before test driving a state-of-the-art passenger train made at the Skoda factory in Pilsen. Crossing the border into Germany, Michael encounters a fire-breathing dragon in Furth-im-Wald, and learns about an early 20th-century pioneer who laid the foundations for Munich's pre-eminence in science and technology

Katherine Parkinson, Daisy May Cooper, Mawaan Rizwan, Richard Herring and Johnny Vegas take part in another round of ludicrous challenges judged by Greg Davies, with Alex Horne keeping score

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A 23-year-old virgin from Kent picks a partner from six nude candidates - but this proves a nerve-racking experience, since he has never seen a naked woman in his life. Meanwhile, a 27-year-old beauty therapist from London is determined to have a baby before she turns 30, and hopes that one of the men lurking behind the screens will be the perfect father

programme.title: World Chase Tag - USA
programme.desc: Highlights from Atlanta, Georgia, as 16 teams from around America competed for the title in a knockout version of the playground game

programme.title: Surviving the Stone Age
programme.desc: Eight experts recreate life in Stone Age Britain, living as a tribe and using the resources and primitive tools of the time to hunt for food and build shelter

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George's continued renovation mission takes him to Moseley and Wheaton Aston in the West Midlands. He begins with a conversion to unite upstairs and downstairs flats in an Arts and Crafts building, although one of his suggestions leaves the owners speechless. He also visits an 18th-century pub that has fallen victim to some dodgy DIY - and quickly devises a clever plan to make the most of the period features

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers
programme.desc: Molly makes a life-like farmyard animal when asked that a donkey be the focal point of a surprise 50th birthday cake. Fondant meets fashion for an eighth birthday celebration

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lollipop lady Alexis Walmsley prepares an American-themed menu for the first dinner party in Warwickshire. However, personal trainer Anthony Deas worries about the food's calorie content, while interior designer Adam Kitchener ruffles feathers with tales of his 'previous life' as a medieval prince

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Interior designer Adam Kitchener throws the second party in Warwickshire, enlisting the help of his ancestor and spirit guide Nanny Annie. There is an unfamiliar face at the dinner table in the form of replacement competitor Lisa Merrell, but this does not prevent the guests from airing their views on the host's oriental lasagne

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: A hearty main course and a light, fluffy cheesecake are on the menu for the third dinner party in Warwickshire, which is hosted by ex-Royal Navy man Anthony Deas. He is confident his cooking can win his guests over, but a lively debate about the monarchy could distract the diners from the food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Antonia Dallow hosts the penultimate dinner party in Warwickshire. The pressure is on after her constant criticism of her fellow guests, but she rises to the challenge by booking a chart-topping performer for the evening's entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Organic gardener Lisa Merrell hosts the final dinner party in Warwickshire with the £1,000 prize at stake. Despite leaving a lot of the preparations to the last minute, she manages to serve her meal on time, but Adam and Anthony begin arguing before the main course is dished up

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Pub landlady Alison seeks a home on the Costa Dorada in Spain. Famous for its golden beaches, the region has stunning river valleys and traditional hilltop villages, where Alison would love to buy a smallholding and keep chickens. With five options up his sleeve, Jonnie Irwin helps Alison and her friend Theresa, who's come along for support, find the perfect property for her £70,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Angela and Michael Sidebotham from Lincolnshire are ready to fulfil their life-long dreams of buying a home in Davenport, Florida, where they plan to spend half of each year. With a budget of £160,000, Sara Damergi shows the couple five properties that meet their requirements

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The Foxhall Village Guest House in Blackpool is the second of this week's venues, where the food falls short of expectations and not everyone has a good night's sleep

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie builds a huge pergola on the terrace for her mother's wedding, while Sarah and George set up a photoshoot to drum up business and unearth a secret underground room

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray indignantly complains that Ally's teacher is giving her too much homework, and ends up having to put his case to the school district's review board. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: As a challenge, Ray writes a moving eulogy for Frank - despite the obvious fact he is still alive. Ray Romano and Peter Boyle star

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. Spurred on by a scathing review by an influential critic, he makes radical changes to alter the staff's attitudes and create food that is up to his own exacting standards

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Angie and Neelesh met 30 years ago on the London Underground, and now with retirement on the horizon they think the time is right to buy a holiday home in their favourite Spanish town of Estepona. The couple have their hearts set on a new build property and have asked Laura Hamilton to help find them the perfect one. Laura lines up various options for their maximum budget of £260,000, but will any impress them enough to make an offer?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps a couple from the Wirral who are approaching retirement to find a holiday home in Tenerife's Costa Adeje on a budget of £150,000

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores London's Restoration history, including the founding of the Royal Society and the violent dark side behind Charles II's carefully crafted public image. She visits St Paul's Cathedral, reveals how women performed on stage for the first time during this period, and uncovers shocking details of the slave trade at the National Maritime Museum. Plus, a look at parallels between the plague that struck London during the 1660s and the Covid-19 pandemic

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree's to-do list is as long as ever, and with no guests, weddings or events at the chateau this year, they use their engineering and design skills to tackle some major projects. First on the list is transforming one of the old outbuildings into a supersized workshop for chateau-sized jobs

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes including Strictly Come Dancing, I'm a Celebrity... A Jungle Story, 24 Hours in Police Custody, Nigella's Cook, Eat, Repeat and Naked Attraction

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present this year's semi-final, the last four bakers facing three patisserie challenges to decide who will be going through to next week's final. The signature round features plenty of alcohol, while the technical challenge sets the bakers the task of making pastry horns. Finally, for the Showstopper, they must use all the precision they can muster to construct a cake made entirely from smaller cakes

programme.title: Educating Greater Manchester
programme.desc: The pressure is on at Harrop Fold as GCSE exams get underway, and the school finds itself hitting the headlines when four members of staff are suspended over allegations of removing disadvantaged and struggling pupils from the school roll to improve exam results. The new heads girl launches an online campaign against uniform policy that lands her in trouble. Mr Walker is concerned that year 10 pupil Morgan may not be able to catch up with Spanish in time for her exams, and Mr Povey intervenes to find out the underlying cause of her disruptive behaviour

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more people looking for love to takje their pick from six nude candidates. Retired dentist Leanne is recently divorced and in search of a sexually experimental man, while former US marine Conor, who falls in love all too easily, is looking for his dream Englishwoman

programme.title: Dance Around the World
programme.desc: Three of Europe's most talented dancers take off on a global quest to find the beating heart and cultural roots of street dance. Throughout the series, the trio step out of their comfort zones, searching for dancing communities who have inspired the art form and discovering the roots of local dance culture. In the first episode, Suzette, Kym and Maren travel to Brazil, where they learn about the fast-paced fusion-dance passinho, before travelling to a rural settlement in the jungle outside Rio, where they are shown the art of capoeira, an ancient dance-fight born from the time of slavery

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Sheila Hancock and broadcaster Gyles Brandreth tackle their first manual lock and some terrifyingly tight turns, but find themselves relaxing into life at 4mph, and marvel at how secret histories reveal themselves. They visit the Royal Gunpowder Mills, which built its own canal system to transport volatile ammunition - vital to Britain's success in both world wars

programme.desc: Rob and Ellen refuse to play charades with Will and Grace because they are too competitive. Meanwhile, Karen's quick thinking saves a workman's life. Comedy, starring Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie injures his back and refuses to let his chiropractor brother help him. Seeking medical advice, he finds out his new doctor is a beautiful woman - but does not realise they have met before. Starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie is eager to impress at a party thrown by gay advertising executive Eric, and asks Alan to pretend to be his partner. However, when the host's beautiful former wife makes an appearance, his cover is soon blown. Guest starring Lucy Lawless, with Charlie Sheen and Jon Cryer

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: The Harpers bump into Charlie's former girlfriend Sherri in a cafe and Alan takes an immediate shine to her, but can't get over her former relationship with his brother. Starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Judith bills Alan for a pair of expensive shoes she bought Jake, and Evelyn harasses Charlie for not keeping in contact. Peeved and generally aggrieved, the brothers take their frustrations out on each other. Charlie Sheen and Jon Cryer star

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Evelyn discovers her second husband Harry has died and is pleased when Alan agrees to attend the funeral with her - until she finds out the pair had stayed in contact. Jake expresses his excitement at seeing a dead body, while Charlie looks forward to the prospect of meeting a recently bereaved widow

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Evelyn sets Alan up with her boyfriend's daughter, who is on a weekend pass from a rehab centre. However, their encounter soon spirals into chaos and finally results in his brand new sports car being involved in a televised high-speed chase. Comedy, starring Jon Cryer and Charlie Sheen

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Evelyn hears that Jake has been spending a lot of time with his other grandparents and demands he stay with her for a night. Alan is horrified at the prospect of his son getting the same treatment he did, so Charlie tries to take his mind off things - with help from a female volleyball team

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie sleeps with a young woman, oblivious to the fact she is married to an elderly man. Jake's teacher asks him to write a report of his weekend and he describes how the man showed up at the apartment looking for his wife, but the story veers some way from what really happened

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents chase more than £1,700 in unpaid parking fines in south-east London, but struggle to pinpoint the debtor. Meanwhile, officers in north Wales try to recover the £2,000 owed by a tradesman to a former employer, and in Kent agents chase £8,000 owed by a jewellery shop to two former employees

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents try to recover more than £12,000 owed by a jeweller to one of his suppliers, but as the tension mounts, the debtor violently lashes out at one of the officers. Meanwhile, agents in London chase up more than £5,000 owed by a tenant to her former landlord for rent arrears, and also attempt to retrieve over £6,000 owed by a property developer

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The officers try to recover £13,000 owed by a high-performance car dealer in Birmingham, and in Wolverhampton the agents chase nearly £2,000 owed to a car hire company. Elsewhere, officers visit a family in Kent to try to collect more than £5,000, but an emotional backstory means they are forced to make a sensitive decision

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Staffordshire, the agents chase up a £3,000 deposit owed by a landlord to his tenant, and officers in Birmingham try to recover £25,000 from a nightclub owner for unpaid solicitor fees. Meanwhile, agents Max and Paul are in Surrey as they attempt to collect more than £3,000 owed to a garage after a customer disputed the repairs made to his van

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: After moving abroad for work, a landlord discovers that his tenants have left him over £20,000 behind with his mortgage, and the developers of an old swimming pool in Bristol discover that they are liable for the electricity that the building's squatters have been using

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Catching up with tenants and landlords from previous episodes, including a man living in a damp and mouldy flat, who was unable to sleep in the bedroom due to the horrendous conditions. The programme also revisits a 70-year-old landlady whose tenants stopped paying the rent for a year, and the council's Rogue Landlord Team in Lewisham, who learned where a slum property owner's reputation for a short fuse came from

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A woman owes five months' rent, but refuses to leave unless the bailiffs arrive, while a man wanted to sell his house post-breakup, but the tenants are still there five years later. Plus, a man happily living in his garden shed

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord seeks urgent advice from eviction specialist Chris after finding his three-bedroom terrace has been stripped bare of the fittings, the flooring, and even the grass on the lawn. Landlady Rose gets a shock when she finally gains access to her property, and Dave from Peterborough Council's housing team comes across some of the worst damp and mould he has ever seen. Plus, Selina and Lee must return from America for a court case to recover £10,000 rent arrears on their UK property

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Kate faces trouble from unruly tenants, who became anti-social, and are now trying to sue her for serving them an eviction notice. Dhiren relates how the existing tenant of a house he bought stopped paying rent as soon as he took ownership, and Tim explains how a health scare left him seeking to sell his property - but a standing occupant refused to leave

programme.title: Gladiator (2000)
programme.desc: Roman general Maximus Decimus Meridius is a casualty of a power struggle between the corrupt Emperor Commodus and the senate. Ordered to be put to death along with his family, he escapes his would-be killers but is sold into slavery as a gladiator - and uses his fame in the arena to fight against the tyrant. Oscar-winning period epic, with Russell Crowe, Joaquin Phoenix, Derek Jacobi and Oliver Reed, in his last film role

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.desc: A long-time crush of Charlie finally agrees to go on a date with him, as long as she can bring her sister - who will also need an escort. Alan is persuaded to step in, even though he has caught flu from Jake, but the entire evening is soon jeopardised. Comedy, starring Jon Cryer

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: In Bristol, eviction lawyer Chris deals with a complex case in which squatters have broken into an empty pub and are now refusing to leave, with landlord Alex wanting them out as he is awaiting planning permission to turn the pub into flats. Jill is trying to regain a property she and her late husband bought as an investment, which she has been renting out to alleviate financial stress

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Harrow Council carries out early morning raids on several dangerous properties, only to find vulnerable tenants in uninhabitable conditions, including one man living in a plywood shed on a roof. Plus, two more cases of nightmare tenants. Nisha lost her job just as her tenants stopped paying the rent, while Andy agreed to rent his north London home to a friend - who ended up subletting the house and pocketing the profits for himself

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, agents Matt and Garry chase £1,700 owed by an accountant to a client, and officers Max and Paul try to recover almost £30,000 in north west London owed in rent arrears by a dentist after he was barred from working. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

Meanwhile, officers Gary and Cona are in Kent to chase over £11,000 owed by a couple for unpaid rent

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers are kept busy with public order patrols as World Cup fever hits Essex, and an ambitious thief tries to steal a 200-gallon fuel tank. In a hunt for stolen vehicles, the Air Support Unit is forced to shut the Dartford Crossing, and a suspected drug dealer cannot give a reasonable explanation for a suspicious nosebleed

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The police helicopter pursues an armed robber who is trying to evade arrest, and the team's new recruits put their detective skills to the test by apprehending suspected burglars. Elsewhere, PC Russ Gay tries to calm down a group of unruly drunken youths and Zippy the sniffer dog makes an interesting discovery inside a stolen car

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: After Scarlett's attack backfires, she is gravely injured, and Ned makes her confess to her disturbing plans. Paul stumbles upon Pierce and Dipi in a heated office-based moment

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Tori nearly interrogates Christian on their date, Justin looks into radiotherapy, and Ziggy forces Tane to move the stolen goods out of the Garage

programme.title: Britain's Parking Hell
programme.desc: One inventive dad thinks he has a solution to reduce the amount of accidents outside of schools, but will his pop-up zebra crossing make the streets around his children's school a safer place? Elsewhere in the programme, cameras join the bus drivers of Bath, whose routes are peppered with evidence of careless parking

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Cameras focus on Sheffield-born market trader Jacqui, who needs to make as much as she can at the tourist night markets on the Costa del Sol prom. There's also a look at cockney former publican Victor, who has spent the past 18 years living in his motor home. But with only his pension to live on, and his movable mansion in need of a refurb, will he have to sell up?

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams aiming to clean up the country, including internet entrepreneur Martin, and his partner-in-grime Glen, who have had enough of the fly-tippers plaguing their beloved Hampshire countryside and have decided to fight back using all means at their disposal. In the North East, the Howdon Sewage Treatment plant not only cleans over 12,000 litres of waste water a second, but even manages to turn it into a gas used to heat homes across the region. But to do it, head honcho Tony has to make sure his plant remains blockage free under a constant assault from wet wipes, sanitary products, false teeth and even the occasional 20ft python

programme.title: Shoplifters: At War with the Law
programme.desc: At West Orchards in Coventry, senior officer Lewis turns detective when a stallholder reports a theft an hour after it happened. He reviews the CCTV footage, pinpoints the incident and tracks down the perpetrator outside the shopping centre. A department store calls in a suspected perfume theft, but until they can review their footage and confirm it security officer Mal keeps track of the suspect on CCTV

programme.title: 5 Clues That Caught the Killer: Rhys Jones
programme.desc: Documentary examining the investigation into the murder of 11-year-old Rhys Jones, a schoolboy shot dead on his way home from football training in 2007. The programme looks at how police managed to make the vital breakthroughs that finally put Rhys' killer behind bars, featuring interviews with police officers and specialists directly involved in the case

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Mitch are on the trail of £2,500 in unpaid parking tickets in Cardiff, and while the debtor is not at home, they notice his car is sporting false number plates and call the police. programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers try to track down the criminals responsible for robbing a supermarket. Elsewhere, an interceptor is unconvinced when a disqualified driver pretends to be someone else, and a rude biker is taken to task

programme.desc: The Essex unit pulls over an angry driver and a car thief leads officers on a cross-country chase. The air support team pursues an athletic burglar and a vehicle with a burst tyre, while other interceptors search for a lost key and are forced to arrest a colleague

programme.title: Greatest Ever Celebrity Wind Ups

programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. programme.title: Blade (1998)
programme.desc: A half-vampire possesses all the strengths inherent in bloodsuckers with none of their weaknesses, and is determined to wipe the monsters from the face of the Earth. However, he faces a deadly new threat in a renegade vampire who is close to decoding an ancient prophecy that will allow him to repopulate the world with his kind. Action thriller, starring Wesley Snipes, Stephen Dorff and Kris Kristofferson

Dr Natalia Spierings treats 42-year-old Shaneef's shoulder lipoma, Dr Adil Sheraz tackles a large head cyst, and Dr Dev Shah comes under fire over his lack of music knowledge. Plus, psoriasis-sufferer John feels he's exhausted all the options for treatment, but can Dr Emma McMullen offer him a ray of hope?

programme.title: Drunk Tank Hangover

programme.desc: Judy enlists the help of Allie, Boomer and Ruby to contact her father, while an increasingly volatile Allie struggles to keep her distance from Ferguson, leading to a confrontation

programme.title: Columbo: Blueprint for Murder (1972)
programme.desc: An architect kills his business partner, and comes up with an elaborate scheme to make Columbo first suspect him, then reject him as the murderer. The villain begins by teasing the detective with hints on where he has hidden the body - hoping that when Columbo fails to find a corpse, he will look elsewhere for a killer. Crime drama, directed by and starring Peter Falk. With Patrick O'Neal and Janis Paige

programme.title: Columbo: Suitable for Framing (1971)
programme.desc: A millionaire art collector is thought to have been killed as the result of a random burglary. However, Columbo is convinced the dead man's nephew committed the crime to avoid being written out of the will, and embarks on a mission to ensnare his suspect. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Ross Martin and Don Ameche

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Crucial Game (1972)
programme.desc: The owner of an American football team is found dead in a swimming pool, and his drowning is regarded as an accident. The down-at-heel detective is convinced that foul play was involved and sets out to prove his case - but his chief suspect has a cast-iron alibi that places him miles away from the scene of the crime. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Culp

programme.title: Columbo: The Greenhouse Jungle (1972)
programme.desc: A penniless rare-plant collector, desperate for funds to support his expensive hobby, fakes his nephew's kidnapping to get his hands on a trust fund. However, the supposed victim turns up dead, prompting Columbo to take action to unmask the killer. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Bradford Dillman and Ray Milland

programme.title: Columbo: Prescription Murder (1968)
programme.desc: A psychiatrist having an affair with a patient murders his wife with his lover's help. However, while he establishes the perfect alibi he soon finds himself pursued by Columbo, whose meandering investigative approach conceals an uncanny gift for detection. First episode of the detective series, starring Peter Falk and Gene Barry

programme.title: Columbo: Grand Deceptions (1989)
programme.desc: An army colonel who embezzled money from his superior officer to fund arms sales becomes the target of a blackmail attempt when his crimes are discovered. The crooked officer kills the extortionist and makes it look like an accident, but the crumpled cop is soon on his case. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Foxworth and Janet Elber

programme.title: Columbo: Murder, Smoke and Shadows (1989)
programme.desc: An ambitious Hollywood director is visited by an old friend, who threatens to expose evidence of his involvement in the death of an actor. The film-maker resorts to murder to keep his dark secret safe, only to end up on the receiving end of Columbo's distinctive brand of interrogation. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Fisher Stevens and Molly Hagan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a wealthy businessman's children in his apartment. At first the victims' stepmother seems the most likely culprit, but the team is also suspicious of two nannies with ties to the grieving family. Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team is asked to disprove accusations against a congressman, but the investigation leads them to uncover a real sex trafficking ring

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A six-year-old boy goes missing during a wild party thrown by his mother

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and her team participate in a city-wide operation to close in on people charged with exploiting underage Catholic schoolchildren, with judges, legislators, lawyers and even members of the NYPD all inplicated in the scandal. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: One of the NYPD's own is implicated in a cover-up, and the SVU tries to unravel a complex sex trafficking operation with roots in government offices, the police department and the Catholic Church. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The detectives are called in on Thanksgiving and assigned to find the missing daughter of the NYPD's first deputy commissioner - an investigation that ends in tragedy with the discovery of her body. Meanwhile, Goren is distracted from the case as he struggles with a personal crisis concerning his mother. Michael Biehn guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Wheeler investigate the death of former child star Alvin Stevens, following a trail of clues that leads them to Albanian mobsters and a DVD counterfeiting operation. As inquiries proceed, they also encounter a washed-up celebrity who enjoyed screen success as a youngster. Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson star

programme.title: Castle

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Assistant DAs McCoy and Kincaid put their careers on the line in search of the truth behind the death of a wealthy woman. Meanwhile, detectives question the victim's first and second husbands, and her teenage daughter

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A routine investigation brings to light evidence that prompts Briscoe and Logan to pick up the trail of a political fugitive who went underground following a 1971 burglary that left a police officer dead. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lt Van Buren is mugged by two teenagers, but the hold-up does not go according to plan and the officer discharges her weapon, killing one of the youngsters with a shot to the back. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the abduction and murder of a teacher, and later discover it's possible that she knew the culprit. Having arrested one of her students, the courts quickly decide their evidence is inadmissible - but it seems another assailant could be to blame. Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman's body is found in a lift, and McCoy finds his prosecution of the prime suspect hampered by a vindictive judge Ross offended in court

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A student is found stabbed to death in his flat, and a college friend is soon named prime suspect - but she claims the victim was a stranger who used a date rape drug on her. However, it soon emerges that the crime could have been racially motivated. Drama, with Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of photographer Martin Roe, who was due to testify at an army first lieutenant's court-martial after he captured a picture of what appeared to be a soldier killing an unarmed civilian. However, the photograph is leaked, and Roe is later found dead with a needle in his arm

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Director Vance charges DiNozzo with a special assignment to go to France, locate Admiral Kendall's wayward daughter Amanda and bring her home. Arriving in Marseille, Tony immediately heads to the local NCIS office, only to find five dead agents. After eventually tracking down Amanda, the pair embark on a rollercoaster ride to the relative safety of the nearest NCIS office in Spain. Michael Weatherly stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs travels to his home town after hearing news of his father's death, while the team investigates whether a fire on a US Navy ship was accidental or planned. The vessel served as prison to several members of the Brotherhood of Doubt terrorist group, whom Gibbs was responsible for catching. After the blaze, two of those members are missing. Tony argues that Gibbs would want to know, but Vance does not want him disturbed at this difficult time. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs fights for his life on board a US Navy hospital ship after being shot. Meanwhile, DiNozzo and Joanna Teague head for Shanghai, where they hope to take down the leaders of the terrorist group known as The Calling. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Mimi Rogers

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs throws himself back into his work following his near-death experience, updating his appearance and tackling a new risky case alongside DEA agent Luis Mitchell, who wants help bringing down a drugs cartel. Concerned about his colleague's apparent enthusiasm to re-enter the field, DiNozzo discovers Mitchell is the son of a former NCIS agent who gave his life trying to save Gibbs' late wife and daughter, and this attachment is causing Gibbs to break his own rule against personal involvement in a case. However, a significant danger is posed by Benson Long, the cartel's head, and Mitchell's top target

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is drugged and raped while working behind the bar at a party for a billionaire businessman

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman makes a false accusation, leaving her son faced with a deadly choice. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Ice-T

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team sets out to track down a serial rapist, and traces the culprit to a homeless shelter, where the trail goes cold. Undeterred, Carisi decides to go undercover in an attempt to reveal the perpetrator's identity. New York-set police crime drama, directed by and starring Mariska Hargitay, with Peter Scanavino

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team tries to prevent a miscarriage of justice after a young model is raped by a renowned fashion photographer, who looks to his successful brother to make the charges disappear. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Detectives Logan and Wheeler investigate when a popular online video blogger is apparently kidnapped during a live broadcast, but begin to doubt the crime really occurred. However, the case takes a strange turn when a ransom demand is made. Michelle Trachtenberg guest stars, and veteran US news reporter Larry King appears as himself

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A pregnant Muslim student is murdered, and initial inquiries suggest the crime was prompted by her efforts to break up a clash between two ethnic groups. However, Logan and Wheeler later learn the victim was secretly dating an Italian-American against the wishes of her parents, who had organised an arranged marriage - and as they investigate the animosity between the two families, more blood is shed

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A logbook is Logan's only lead when Arthur Kopinsky is found dead at his law firm. A closer look at the evidence suggests suspects in the form of a swindler who stole a woman's fortune, and the son of his target, who was once wealthy himself. Starring Chris Noth and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of a rare coin dealer, focusing their efforts on a millionaire who seems the most likely culprit - but Ross finds himself forced to play detective too. Sam Waterson and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Curtis uncovers evidence of police corruption that puts the DA's office into conflict with an ambitious judge, and Briscoe comes under investigation for stealing evidence from a police lockup. Crime drama, with Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A janitor is found murdered, leading the team to a schizophrenic student they discover has been part of an experimental drug programme. Though all evidence points to the youngster, it transpires that he had no motive to commit the crime and the police soon turn their attentions to a psychiatrist. Sam Waterston stars

In response, Bishop and McGee go undercover as a married couple to run surveillance on a lieutenant and his wife, who may be connected to the death. Starring Mark Harmon, Emily Wickersham and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A young Navy Seaman is found dead, with his eyes gouged out, after being involved in a car accident. Director Vance makes a rare return to field duty, pairing up with Gibbs to investigate when it becomes clear the killing seems to be connected to the case of Kip Klugman, a former NCIS agent he once locked up for stealing evidence. Starring Mark Harmon and Rocky Carroll

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the contract killing of a businessman's wife. Evidence at the scene points to two assailants, one of whom was wearing a bandage, and the victim's mother-in-law becomes the chief suspect. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates a youth hockey team, where bullying of new players has taken a dangerous turn

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Fin revisits his military roots when a fellow Army ranger struggles to recover from a sexual assault. Sarah Booth guest stars, with Ice T and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A contestant on a reality dating show claims to have been raped. Co-operating with the SVU, the programme's producers agree to let Benson and her team go undercover on the set for an incognito investigation. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A corrections officer is arrested, accused of sexually assaulting his female charges both inside the prison system and beyond. As the case against the man begins to take shape, the union that supports him takes aim at Barba and the other members of the unit. Crime drama, starring Raul Esparza

Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star, with Doris Roberts and Richard Kind

Xander Berkeley guest stars, with Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
